In 1815, the landscape was largely rural. Dalton village was located in the northeast, surrounded by a small number of houses. To the west, Dalton Forest covered a large area, while Hall Farm lay near the centre. A ford crossed the river in the southwest, and a bridleway ran along the southern side of the River Dal. Dalton Hall was situated to the east of the village.

By 2015, the area had been transformed into a more developed town. The forest and farm had disappeared, making way for an industrial zone in the west and expanded residential areas across the map. A bridge replaced the ford, improving access across the river. New public facilities were introduced, including a school near the centre and a hospital in the northwest. In the southeast, a hotel was built close to Dalton Hall, while an airport was constructed along the southern edge of the river.

title: Map: The diagrams below show the development of a town called Brindell and the local ar...
prompt: The diagrams below show the development of a town called Brindell and the local areas in 1800, 1900 and 2000. Summarize the information and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Brindell area (1800 → 1900 → 2000\)
1\. Giải thích đề

Sơ đồ cho thấy sự phát triển của khu vực Brindell trong ba mốc thời gian: 1800, 1900 và 2000\.

→ Dạng: map – changes over time (3 stages)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ: Brindell – 1800 / 1900 / 2000

Dùng:

  • show → illustrate / compare
  • over time → over a 200-year period
3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Khu vực chuyển từ nông nghiệp → công nghiệp và đô thị hóa
  • Xuất hiện industry và khu dân cư (Bun Hill) từ năm 1900
  • Đến năm 2000:
  • Công nghiệp mở rộng đáng kể
  • Một phần woodland được chuyển thành công viên (Bun Hill Park)
  • Sông và một số khu đất giữ nguyên tương đối
4\. Chia BODY
BODY 1 – Giai đoạn 1800 → 1900
  • Năm 1800:
  • Chủ yếu là:
  • Farm land (crops & animals)
  • Woodland
  • Chưa có khu dân cư hay công nghiệp
  • Năm 1900:
  • Khu đất nuôi động vật → converted into industry
  • Xuất hiện:
  • Bun Hill (village for workers)
  • Các khu khác (crops, woodland, river) hầu như không đổi

→ Ý: bắt đầu công nghiệp hoá

BODY 2 – Giai đoạn 1900 → 2000
  • Industry mở rộng đáng kể (tăng số lượng nhà máy)
  • Bun Hill vẫn giữ nguyên vị trí
  • Woodland:
  • Một phần → converted into Bun Hill Park
  • Các khu khác:
  • Farm land (crops) và River Stour gần như không thay đổi

→ Ý: phát triển mạnh nhưng có yếu tố cải thiện môi trường (park)

5\. Gợi ý từ vựng
  • be transformed into → được chuyển đổi thành
  • be converted into → được chuyển thành
  • be expanded → được mở rộng
  • remain unchanged → giữ nguyên
  • industrial development → sự phát triển công nghiệp
  • urbanisation → đô thị hoá

The maps illustrate changes in the area around the River Stour between 1800 and 2000\.

Overall, the area underwent gradual industrialisation and development, with farmland for animals replaced by industry and a workers’ village, while a new park was later created and woodland expanded.

In 1800, the landscape was largely rural. Farmland for crops was located in the northwest, while woodland occupied the northeast. In the southeast, land was used for animals, and the settlement of Brindell lay in the southwest. The River Stour ran through the centre of the area.

By 1900, significant changes had occurred in the southeast, where the animal farmland had been replaced by an industrial zone. A village named Bun Hill was also established nearby to accommodate workers. However, the farmland for crops, woodland, and Brindell remained largely unchanged.

In 2000, further development took place. The industrial area expanded considerably, and Bun Hill remained in place. A large park, Bun Hill Park, was created in the northeast, replacing part of the woodland. Meanwhile, the farmland for crops and the settlement of Brindell continued to exist with little change.

title: Line Graph: The graph shows the amount of fruit produced in four countries (France, Spain, Ger...
prompt: The graph shows the amount of fruit produced in four countries (France, Spain, Germany, Turkey) from 1970 to 2010. Summarize the information by reporting the main features, and making comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Fruit Production in Four Countries (1970–2010)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện sản lượng trái cây (triệu tấn) ở 4 quốc gia:

  • Spain
  • Turkey
  • France
  • Germany

trong giai đoạn 1970–2010

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ comparison)

2\. Introduction

The line graph illustrates the amount of fruit produced, measured in millions of tonnes, in four countries between 1970 and 2010\.

3\. Overview
  • Spain luôn là nước sản xuất nhiều nhất
  • Turkey và France có xu hướng tăng
  • Germany giảm dần theo thời gian
  • France biến động nhưng tăng mạnh về cuối kỳ

→ Xu hướng chính:

  • dominant country (Spain)
  • upward trend (Turkey, France)
  • downward trend (Germany)
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo xu hướng:

  • Body 1: Spain \+ Turkey (mức cao, xu hướng rõ)
  • Body 2: France \+ Germany (mức thấp hơn, biến động trái chiều)
BODY 1

Spain:

  • tăng từ \~5.5 lên 6 (1980)
  • sau đó giảm dần xuống \~5.1

→ slight rise then gradual decline

Turkey:

  • tăng đều từ 2 → 3.5

→ steady growth

BODY 2

France:

  • tăng nhẹ (1970–1980)
  • tăng mạnh đến \~2.2 (1990)
  • giảm nhẹ (2000)
  • tăng mạnh lên \~2.9 (2010)

→ fluctuation with overall increase

Germany:

  • giảm liên tục từ \~2.5 xuống \~1.3
  • gần như ổn định sau 1990

→ steady decline then stabilization

5\. Từ vựng ăn điểm
  • remain the highest
  • increase steadily
  • decline gradually
  • fluctuate
  • reach a peak of
  • fall to
  • overall upward trend

The line chart compares fruit production in Spain, Turkey, France and Germany between 1970 and 2010, measured in millions of tonnes.

Overall, Spain remained the largest producer throughout the period despite a gradual decline after 1980\. Turkey showed steady growth and became the second-largest producer by the end. France experienced fluctuations but generally increased, while Germany saw a consistent downward trend.

Spain’s output rose from about 5.5 million tonnes in 1970 to a peak of 6 million in 1980, before falling gradually to just over 5 million by 2010\. In contrast, Turkey’s production increased steadily from 2 million tonnes to approximately 3.5 million over the same period.

France started at around 1.2 million tonnes in 1970 and climbed modestly to about 1.3 million in 1980\. It then rose more sharply to just above 2 million in 1990, dipped slightly in 2000, and finished at nearly 2.9 million tonnes in 2010\. Germany, however, declined from roughly 2.5 million tonnes in 1970 to around 1.3 million by the end of the period, with only minor fluctuations after 1990\.

title: Line Graph: The number of overseas visitors who came to the UK for different purposes between ...
prompt: The line graph shows the number of overseas visitors who came to the UK for different purposes between 1989 and 2009. Summarize the information by reporting the main features and making comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Visitors by Purpose: Business, Holiday and Meeting Friends (1989–2009)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện số lượng khách (triệu người) theo 3 mục đích:

  • Business
  • Holiday
  • Meeting friends and relatives

trong giai đoạn 1989–2009

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ purposes)

2\. Introduction

The line graph compares the number of visitors, measured in millions, travelling for business, holidays, and to meet friends and relatives between 1989 and 2009\.

3\. Overview
  • Holiday là mục đích phổ biến nhất trong phần lớn thời gian
  • Business và visiting friends nhìn chung tăng
  • Holiday biến động rõ rệt, trong khi hai nhóm còn lại tăng ổn định hơn
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo đặc điểm:

  • Body 1: Holiday (dominant \+ fluctuation)
  • Body 2: Business \+ Meeting friends (overall increase)
BODY 1
Holiday:
  • tăng mạnh từ \~6.5 lên 9 (1994)
  • giảm xuống \~6.3 (2004)
  • sau đó tăng lại 9 (2009)

→ strong fluctuation with two peaks

BODY 2
Business:
  • giảm nhẹ từ 5 → \~4 (1994)
  • tăng đều lên 8 (2004)
  • giảm nhẹ còn \~7

→ overall upward trend despite early drop

Meeting friends and relatives:
  • tăng liên tục từ 3.5 → \~6.8 (2004)
  • giảm nhẹ về \~6.2

→ steady rise then slight fall

5\. Từ vựng ăn điểm
  • remain the most popular
  • fluctuate significantly
  • increase steadily
  • rise sharply
  • fall slightly
  • reach a peak of
  • show an overall upward trend

The line chart illustrates the number of visitors (in millions) who travelled for three purposes—business, holidays, and visiting friends and relatives—between 1989 and 2009\.

Overall, holidays remained the most common reason for travel across the period, although the figure fluctuated. Business travel showed a general upward trend despite a slight decline at the end, while visits to friends and relatives increased steadily before experiencing a minor drop in the final year.

Holiday travel rose from about 6.5 million in 1989 to a peak of 9 million in 1994, before falling to around 7 million in 1999 and further to approximately 6.5 million in 2004\. It then recovered significantly, reaching 9 million again by 2009\.

In contrast, business travel began at 5 million in 1989 and dipped slightly to just over 4 million in 1994\. It then climbed steadily to 6 million in 1999 and peaked at 8 million in 2004, before declining modestly to 7 million in 2009\.

Meanwhile, the number of people visiting friends and relatives increased consistently from roughly 3.5 million in 1989 to nearly 7 million in 2004\. However, this figure fell slightly to just above 6 million by the end of the period.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows information about the percentage of the population in four A...
prompt: The graph below shows information about the percentage of the population in four Asian countries living in cities from 1970 to 2020, with predictions for 2030 and 2040. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Line graph: Percentage of the population living in cities (1970–2040)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ cho thấy tỷ lệ dân số sống ở khu vực thành thị tại bốn quốc gia trong giai đoạn từ 1970 đến 2040\.

→ Dạng: line graph – multiple groups (so sánh \+ xu hướng theo thời gian, có cả dự đoán)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

percentage / proportion

population

living in cities / urban areas

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / compares

living in cities → residing in urban areas

Mẫu:

The line graph illustrates the proportion of the population living in urban areas in four countries between 1970 and 2040\.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Malaysia có tỷ lệ đô thị hóa cao nhất và tăng đều mạnh

Indonesia tăng nhanh nhất, đặc biệt sau năm 2000

Philippines dao động nhẹ trước khi tăng trở lại

Thailand luôn thấp nhất nhưng có xu hướng tăng

Từ khóa nên dùng:

showed the most significant growth

experienced rapid increases

fluctuated slightly

remained the lowest

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – Nhóm nổi bật (Malaysia & Indonesia)

Malaysia:

tăng đều từ khoảng 30% lên hơn 80%

→ xu hướng tăng mạnh và ổn định

Indonesia:

tăng nhanh từ khoảng 13% lên 70%

đặc biệt tăng mạnh sau năm 2000

→ tốc độ tăng nhanh nhất

Ý chính: hai quốc gia này có xu hướng tăng rõ rệt, trong đó Indonesia tăng nhanh nhất còn Malaysia duy trì mức cao nhất

BODY 2 – Nhóm còn lại (Philippines & Thailand)

Philippines:

tăng từ khoảng 32% lên gần 50% vào 1990, sau đó giảm nhẹ rồi tăng lại lên \~60%

→ xu hướng dao động nhẹ

Thailand:

tăng chậm từ khoảng 17% lên gần 50%

luôn là quốc gia có tỷ lệ thấp nhất

→ tăng ổn định nhưng chậm

Ý chính: Philippines có biến động nhẹ, trong khi Thailand tăng đều nhưng luôn ở mức thấp hơn các nước khác

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

increase steadily

rise sharply

experience a fluctuation

decline slightly

remain the highest

record the lowest figure

show an upward trend

grow gradually

Ví dụ:

The proportion of people living in cities in Malaysia increased steadily throughout the period.

Indonesia experienced a sharp rise, particularly after 2000\.

The Philippines showed slight fluctuations before rising again.

Thailand consistently recorded the lowest figures despite gradual growth.

—--------------------------

The line graph compares the proportion of people living in cities in four countries—Philippines, Malaysia, Thailand, and Indonesia—between 1970 and 2040\.

In 1970, urban populations were relatively low in all countries, with the Philippines and Malaysia at around 30%, compared to approximately 17% in Thailand and 13% in Indonesia. Over the following decades, Malaysia showed a steady and consistent increase, rising to about 60% in 2000 and continuing upward to just over 80% by 2040, making it the most urbanised country throughout the later years.

The Philippines followed a more fluctuating pattern. Its figure increased from just above 30% in 1970 to a peak of around 48% in 1990, before declining slightly to the mid-40s in 2010\. It then recovered gradually, reaching approximately 60% by 2040\.

Indonesia experienced the most notable late growth. Starting from the lowest point, it rose slowly to 30% in 2000, after which it increased sharply, reaching around 70% by 2040\. In contrast, Thailand had the slowest overall growth, climbing gradually from about 17% in 1970 to around 30% in 2000, and then rising more moderately to just under 50% by the end of the period.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the number of inquiries received by the Tourist Information ...
prompt: The graph below shows the number of inquiries received by the Tourist Information Office in one city over a six-month period in 2011. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Line graph: Percentage of the population living in cities (1970–2040)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ cho thấy tỷ lệ dân số sống ở khu vực thành thị tại bốn quốc gia (Philippines, Malaysia, Thailand, Indonesia) từ năm 1970 đến 2040\.

→ Dạng: line graph – multiple groups (so sánh \+ xu hướng theo thời gian, có yếu tố dự đoán)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

percentage / proportion

population

living in cities / urban areas

four countries

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / compares

living in cities → residing in urban areas

Mẫu:

The line graph illustrates the proportion of people living in urban areas in four different countries between 1970 and 2040\.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Malaysia tăng mạnh và trở thành nước có tỷ lệ cao nhất

Indonesia có tốc độ tăng nhanh nhất, đặc biệt sau năm 2000

Philippines dao động nhẹ trước khi tăng trở lại

Thailand luôn thấp nhất nhưng tăng đều theo thời gian

Từ khóa nên dùng:

experienced the most significant growth

rose rapidly

showed slight fluctuations

remained the lowest

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – Nhóm nổi bật (Malaysia & Indonesia)

Malaysia:

tăng liên tục từ khoảng 30% lên hơn 80%

→ xu hướng tăng mạnh và ổn định, luôn đứng đầu từ sau 2000

Indonesia:

tăng từ khoảng 13% lên khoảng 60%

đặc biệt tăng nhanh từ 2000 đến 2020 (30% → 50%)

→ tốc độ tăng nhanh nhất

Ý chính: cả hai quốc gia đều tăng mạnh, trong đó Malaysia dẫn đầu còn Indonesia có mức tăng ấn tượng nhất

BODY 2 – Nhóm còn lại (Philippines & Thailand)

Philippines:

tăng từ khoảng 32% lên gần 48% vào 1990

sau đó giảm nhẹ xuống \~42% vào 2010 rồi tăng lại lên \~50%

→ xu hướng dao động nhẹ

Thailand:

tăng đều từ khoảng 17% lên khoảng 46%

→ tăng chậm nhưng ổn định, luôn thấp nhất

Ý chính: Philippines có sự biến động nhẹ trong khi Thailand duy trì xu hướng tăng đều nhưng ở mức thấp hơn các nước khác

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

increase steadily

rise sharply

experience fluctuations

decline slightly

remain the highest

record the lowest figure

show an upward trend

grow gradually

Ví dụ:

Malaysia experienced a steady and significant increase throughout the period.

Indonesia saw a sharp rise, particularly after 2000\.

The Philippines showed slight fluctuations before rising again.

Thailand remained the lowest despite gradual growth.

—---------------------------------

The line graph illustrates the proportion of people living in urban areas in four countries—Philippines, Malaysia, Thailand and Indonesia—between 1970 and 2040\.

Malaysia shows a steady and consistent increase throughout the period. Starting at around 30% in 1970, it rose to approximately 45% in 1990, then climbed sharply to 60% in 2000 and continued growing to just over 80% by 2040, making it the highest among all countries from 2000 onwards.

The Philippines follows a more fluctuating pattern. Its urban population increased from about 32% in 1970 to a peak of roughly 48% in 1990, before declining slightly to just above 40% in 2010\. After that, it recovered gradually, reaching around 50% by the end of the period.

Indonesia experienced the most dramatic growth after 2000\. Beginning at approximately 13% in 1970, it rose steadily to 30% in 2000, then increased rapidly to about 60% by 2040\.

Thailand, in contrast, had the lowest figures overall. Although it grew from around 17% in 1970 to 30% in 1990, its increase remained relatively slow until 2020, before rising more noticeably to roughly 46% in the final year.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows different sources of air pollutants in the UK from 1990 to 2...
prompt: The graph below shows different sources of air pollutants in the UK from 1990 to 2005. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and making comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Line graph: Air pollutants by source (1990–2005)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ cho thấy lượng khí thải (triệu tấn) từ ba nguồn khác nhau (transport, industry, household) và tổng lượng khí thải trong giai đoạn 1990–2005.

→ Dạng: line graph – multiple groups (so sánh \+ xu hướng theo thời gian)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

air pollutants

sources

million tonnes

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / compares

by source → from different sources

Mẫu:

The line graph illustrates the amount of air pollutants emitted from different sources between 1990 and 2005, measured in million tonnes.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Tổng lượng khí thải giảm đều theo thời gian

Industry giảm mạnh nhất và là nguồn chính

Transport tăng nhẹ

Household giảm nhìn chung nhưng có dao động nhỏ

Từ khóa nên dùng:

showed a downward trend

declined significantly

remained the main source

fluctuated slightly

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – Nhóm chính (Total & Industry)

Total:

giảm đều từ khoảng 7 xuống hơn 3 triệu tấn

→ xu hướng giảm rõ rệt

Industry:

giảm mạnh từ khoảng 5.7 xuống dưới 2

đặc biệt giảm nhanh giai đoạn 1993–1996

→ nguồn gây ô nhiễm lớn nhất nhưng giảm đáng kể

Ý chính: tổng lượng khí thải giảm chủ yếu do sự sụt giảm mạnh từ ngành công nghiệp

BODY 2 – Nhóm còn lại (Transport & Household)

Transport:

tăng nhẹ từ khoảng 1 lên khoảng 1.4–1.5

có dao động nhỏ nhưng xu hướng chung là tăng

→ nguồn duy nhất tăng

Household:

giảm từ khoảng 1 xuống gần 0.2

có tăng nhẹ vào năm 1999 trước khi tiếp tục giảm

→ xu hướng giảm nhưng không ổn định

Ý chính: transport tăng nhẹ trong khi household giảm dần với một vài biến động nhỏ

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

decline steadily

drop sharply

increase slightly

experience fluctuations

remain the largest contributor

show a downward trend

rise gradually

Ví dụ:

The total amount of air pollutants declined steadily over the period.

Industrial emissions dropped sharply, especially in the mid-1990s.

Transport emissions increased slightly despite minor fluctuations.

Household emissions showed an overall decrease with some variation.

The line graph illustrates the amount of air pollutants produced by different sources—transport, industry, and households—between 1990 and 2005, measured in million tonnes, along with the overall total.

Overall, total air pollution declined steadily over the period, largely driven by a significant reduction in industrial emissions. By contrast, transport emissions showed a slight upward trend, while household pollution decreased overall despite minor fluctuations.

In 1990, industry was the dominant source of pollution at approximately 5.7 million tonnes, followed by transport and household emissions at around 1 million tonnes each. Industrial emissions then fell sharply to about 3 million tonnes in 1996 and continued to decline gradually to just under 2 million tonnes by 2005\. This substantial reduction was the main contributor to the overall drop in total pollution, which decreased from 7 million tonnes to just over 3 million tonnes during the period.

Transport emissions, on the other hand, increased moderately. Starting at 1 million tonnes in 1990, they rose to around 1.4 million tonnes in 1996, fluctuated slightly thereafter, and ended at approximately 1.4 million tonnes in 2005\. Meanwhile, household emissions followed a generally downward trend, falling from 1 million tonnes to about 0.2 million tonnes, despite a brief increase to around 0.7 million tonnes in 1999\.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the number of tourists (measured in millions) visiting a par...
prompt: The graph below shows the number of tourists (measured in millions) visiting a particular Caribbean island between 2010 and 2017. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Line graph: Number of tourists visiting a Caribbean island (2010–2017)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ cho thấy số lượng khách du lịch (triệu người) đến một hòn đảo Caribbean từ năm 2010 đến 2017, gồm ba nhóm: khách ở trên tàu du lịch (cruise ships), khách ở trên đảo (island), và tổng số khách.

→ Dạng: line graph – multiple groups (so sánh \+ xu hướng theo thời gian)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

number of tourists

Caribbean island

visitors

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / compares

visiting → travelling to

Mẫu:

The line graph illustrates the number of tourists visiting a Caribbean island between 2010 and 2017, including those staying on cruise ships and on the island.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Tổng số khách du lịch tăng mạnh theo thời gian

Khách ở trên tàu tăng nhanh nhất

Khách ở trên đảo tăng rồi chững lại

Từ khoảng 2016, khách tàu vượt khách ở đảo

Từ khóa nên dùng:

showed a significant increase

rose sharply

remained relatively stable

overtook

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – Tổng & Cruise ships

Total:

tăng đều từ khoảng 1 triệu lên 3.5 triệu

→ xu hướng tăng mạnh và liên tục

Cruise ships:

tăng từ khoảng 0.3 lên 2 triệu

có giảm nhẹ năm 2012 nhưng sau đó tăng nhanh

→ tăng mạnh nhất

Ý chính: tổng số khách tăng chủ yếu nhờ sự gia tăng mạnh của khách đi tàu

BODY 2 – Visitors staying on island

Island:

tăng từ khoảng 0.7 lên 1.5 vào 2013

sau đó giữ ổn định đến 2015

giảm nhẹ năm 2016 rồi tăng lại

→ xu hướng tăng nhưng có giai đoạn chững

So sánh:

ban đầu cao hơn cruise ships

nhưng bị vượt vào khoảng 2016

Ý chính: khách ở đảo tăng sớm nhưng không duy trì được tốc độ, và bị nhóm cruise vượt qua

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

increase steadily

rise sharply

experience a slight dip

remain stable

level off

overtake

reach a peak

Ví dụ:

The total number of tourists increased steadily over the period.

Visitors staying on cruise ships rose sharply despite a brief dip in 2012\.

The number of tourists staying on the island remained stable for several years before rising again.

Cruise ship visitors overtook island visitors towards the end of the period.

The line graph shows the number of tourists visiting a Caribbean island between 2010 and 2017, divided into visitors staying on cruise ships and those staying on the island, measured in millions.

Overall, the total number of tourists increased steadily over the period, with particularly strong growth after 2012\. While visitors staying on the island were higher at the beginning, those staying on cruise ships grew more rapidly and eventually overtook them.

In 2010, around 0.7 million tourists stayed on the island, compared to only 0.3 million cruise ship visitors, resulting in a total of 1 million. The number of island-based tourists remained relatively stable at about 0.7 million in 2011 before rising to 1.5 million in 2013\. It then plateaued until 2015, dipped slightly to around 1.3 million in 2016, and recovered to 1.5 million in the final year.

By contrast, cruise ship visitors showed a more fluctuating but overall upward trend. Starting at 0.3 million in 2010, the figure rose to 0.5 million in 2011, fell back to 0.3 million in 2012, and then increased consistently to reach 2 million by 2017\. Notably, cruise ship visitors surpassed those staying on the island in 2016\.

As a result of these trends, the total number of tourists rose from 1 million in 2010 to 3.5 million in 2017, with the most significant growth occurring in the latter half of the period.

title: Line Graph: The chart below gives information about computer ownership per household in the US...
prompt: The chart below gives information about computer ownership per household in the US from 1997 to 2012. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Line graph: Computer ownership in the U.S (1997–2012)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ cho thấy tỷ lệ hộ gia đình ở Mỹ sở hữu số lượng máy tính khác nhau (không có, 1, 2, hoặc 3+ máy) trong giai đoạn 1997–2012.

→ Dạng: line graph – multiple groups (so sánh \+ xu hướng theo thời gian)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

computer ownership

households

number of computers

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / compares

number of computers → different levels of computer ownership

Mẫu:

The line graph illustrates the percentage of households in the U.S. with different levels of computer ownership between 1997 and 2012\.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Tỷ lệ hộ không có máy tính giảm mạnh

Hộ có 1 máy tăng và trở thành nhóm phổ biến nhất

Hộ có 2 và 3+ máy đều tăng

→ xu hướng chung: mức độ sở hữu máy tính ngày càng cao

Từ khóa nên dùng:

declined significantly

became the most common category

increased steadily

showed an upward trend

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – Nhóm chính (No computer & 1 computer)

No computer:

giảm mạnh từ khoảng 67% xuống dưới 20%

→ xu hướng giảm rõ rệt

1 computer:

tăng từ khoảng 27% lên khoảng 50%

có giảm nhẹ năm 2006 nhưng sau đó tăng lại

→ trở thành nhóm cao nhất từ 2003

Ý chính: số hộ không có máy giảm mạnh trong khi hộ có 1 máy tăng và chiếm ưu thế

BODY 2 – Nhóm còn lại (2 computers & 3+ computers)

2 computers:

tăng đều từ khoảng 5% lên hơn 20%

→ tăng ổn định

3+ computers:

tăng từ khoảng 1% lên gần 10%

có giảm nhẹ ở cuối kỳ

→ tăng nhưng vẫn là nhóm thấp nhất

Ý chính: các hộ sở hữu nhiều máy hơn ngày càng phổ biến, dù vẫn chiếm tỷ lệ nhỏ hơn

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

increase steadily

rise gradually

decline sharply

remain the lowest

become dominant

show an upward trend

Ví dụ:

The proportion of households with no computer declined sharply over the period.

Ownership of one computer increased steadily and became the most common category.

The figures for two and three or more computers rose gradually.

Households with three or more computers remained the least common group.

The line graph illustrates the percentage of households in the U.S. owning different numbers of computers between 1997 and 2012\.

Overall, computer ownership became increasingly widespread over the period. The proportion of households with no computer declined markedly, while those owning one or more devices rose, particularly in the case of households with two or more computers.

In 1997, households without a computer accounted for the largest share at around 67%, followed by those with one computer at approximately 27%. Over time, the figure for non-ownership fell steadily to about 17% in 2012\. In contrast, the percentage of households owning one computer increased from 27% to a peak of 50% in 2003, before fluctuating slightly and ending at around 50% in the final year.

Meanwhile, ownership of multiple computers rose consistently. The proportion of households with two computers grew from roughly 5% in 1997 to about 23% in 2012\. Similarly, those with three or more computers increased from just 2% to around 9% in 2009, before experiencing a slight decline to approximately 8% by the end of the period.

title: Line Graph: The percentage of the population in three different countries who used the interne...
prompt: The line graph shows the percentage of the population in three different countries who used the internet between 1999 and 2009. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Line graph: Internet users as a percentage of population (1999–2009)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ cho thấy tỷ lệ người sử dụng Internet (% dân số) tại ba quốc gia: USA, Canada và Mexico trong giai đoạn 1999–2009.

→ Dạng: line graph – multiple groups (so sánh \+ xu hướng theo thời gian)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

Internet users

percentage of population

three countries

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / compares

Internet users → people using the Internet

Mẫu:

The line graph illustrates the percentage of Internet users in three countries between 1999 and 2009\.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Cả ba quốc gia đều tăng mạnh theo thời gian

Canada tăng nhanh nhất và trở thành nước cao nhất từ 2003

USA tăng đều và đứng thứ hai

Mexico tăng chậm hơn và luôn thấp nhất

Từ khóa nên dùng:

showed an upward trend

rose sharply

increased steadily

remained the lowest

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – Canada & USA

Canada:

tăng mạnh từ khoảng 5% lên hơn 90%

đặc biệt tăng đột biến giai đoạn 2001–2003

→ tăng nhanh nhất và cao nhất

USA:

tăng đều từ khoảng 15% lên khoảng 70%

→ xu hướng ổn định, đứng thứ hai

Ý chính: Canada vượt USA từ 2003 và duy trì khoảng cách lớn đến cuối kỳ

BODY 2 – Mexico

Mexico:

tăng từ khoảng 2% lên khoảng 35%

→ tăng liên tục nhưng chậm hơn đáng kể

So sánh:

luôn thấp hơn rõ rệt so với USA và Canada

Ý chính: Mexico có xu hướng tăng ổn định nhưng vẫn ở mức thấp nhất trong suốt giai đoạn

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

increase steadily

rise sharply

grow significantly

show an upward trend

remain considerably lower

experience rapid growth

Ví dụ:

Internet usage in Canada rose sharply, especially between 2001 and 2003\.

The figure for the USA increased steadily throughout the period.

Mexico experienced gradual growth but remained significantly lower than the other countries.

The line graph illustrates the proportion of internet users as a percentage of the population in the USA, Canada, and Mexico between 1999 and 2009\.

Overall, internet usage rose significantly in all three countries. Canada experienced the fastest growth and became the leading country from 2003 onwards, while Mexico remained the lowest despite steady increases.

In 1999, the USA had the highest proportion at about 15%, followed by Canada at roughly 5%, and Mexico at only around 2%. By 2001, the USA had risen to approximately 30%, while Canada increased more modestly to about 18%. However, Canada then saw a sharp surge to around 55% in 2003, overtaking the USA, which reached just under 40% in the same year.

After 2003, all three countries continued to grow. The USA increased steadily from about 38% to 70% by 2009\. Canada maintained the most rapid upward trend, climbing from around 55% in 2003 to approximately 90% in the final year. Meanwhile, Mexico showed gradual but consistent growth, rising from about 2% in 1999 to around 35% by 2009\.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the average number of people attending top-level football ma...
prompt: The graph below shows the average number of people attending top-level football matches in three European countries from 1980 to 2004. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Line graph: Average attendance per top-level football match (1980–2004)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ cho thấy số lượng khán giả trung bình (nghìn người) mỗi trận bóng đá cấp cao nhất tại ba quốc gia: Italy, England và Germany từ năm 1980 đến 2004\.

→ Dạng: line graph – multiple groups (so sánh \+ xu hướng theo thời gian)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

average attendance

football matches

three countries

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / compares

top-level → major / professional

Mẫu:

The line graph illustrates the average number of spectators attending top-level football matches in three countries between 1980 and 2004\.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Italy giảm dần theo thời gian

England và Germany giảm ban đầu rồi tăng mạnh

Đến cuối kỳ, England có mức cao nhất

→ xu hướng trái ngược giữa Italy và hai nước còn lại

Từ khóa nên dùng:

declined overall

recovered and increased

showed an upward trend

reached the highest figure

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – Italy

Italy:

tăng nhẹ từ 35 lên 37 (1980–1986)

sau đó giảm đều xuống khoảng 25 vào 2004

→ xu hướng giảm tổng thể

Ý chính: Italy bắt đầu cao nhất nhưng giảm liên tục về cuối kỳ

BODY 2 – England & Germany

England:

giảm từ 25 xuống 22 (1980–1986)

sau đó tăng dần lên khoảng 34 (cao nhất vào cuối kỳ)

→ phục hồi và tăng mạnh

Germany:

giảm mạnh từ \~25 xuống \~18 (1986)

sau đó tăng đều lên khoảng 32–33

→ phục hồi rõ rệt

So sánh:

cả hai nước đều vượt Italy vào cuối giai đoạn

Ý chính: England và Germany có xu hướng phục hồi sau giai đoạn giảm, và vượt Italy về lượng khán giả

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

decline gradually

drop sharply

recover

increase steadily

surpass / overtake

reach a peak

Ví dụ:

Attendance in Italy declined gradually after an initial rise.

England experienced a slight drop before recovering steadily.

Germany saw a sharp decline followed by consistent growth.

By the end of the period, both England and Germany had overtaken Italy.

The line graph compares the average attendance per top-level football match in Italy, England, and Germany between 1980 and 2004, measured in thousands of spectators.

Overall, Italy started with the highest attendance but experienced a steady decline over time, while England and Germany showed overall upward trends and eventually surpassed Italy by the end of the period.

In 1980, Italy recorded the highest figure at around 35,000 spectators per match, compared to approximately 25,000 in England and 24,000 in Germany. Italy’s attendance then rose slightly to about 37,000 in 1986 before falling steadily to 30,000 in 1992 and continuing to decline to 25,000 by 2004\.

England followed a different pattern. After a drop from 25,000 in 1980 to roughly 22,000 in 1986, attendance gradually increased to around 24,000 in 1992 and 26,000 in 1998, before reaching a peak of approximately 34,000 in 2004\.

Germany saw a sharper fluctuation initially, declining from about 24,000 in 1980 to around 18,000 in 1986\. However, this was followed by a consistent rise, with figures reaching 22,000 in 1992, 26,000 in 1998, and approximately 32,000 by the final year.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the average time spent by four car manufacturers to produce ...
prompt: The graph below shows the average time spent by four car manufacturers to produce vehicles at their US factories. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Line graph: Average hours to produce cars in the US (1998–2005)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ cho thấy số giờ trung bình cần để sản xuất ô tô tại Mỹ của bốn hãng: General Motors, Ford, Toyota và Honda trong giai đoạn 1998–2005.

→ Dạng: line graph – multiple groups (so sánh \+ xu hướng theo thời gian)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

average hours

produce cars

four manufacturers

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / compares

produce → manufacture

Mẫu:

The line graph illustrates the average number of hours required to manufacture cars in the US by four companies between 1998 and 2005\.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Nhìn chung, thời gian sản xuất giảm ở hầu hết các hãng

General Motors và Ford giảm đáng kể

Toyota và Honda luôn có thời gian thấp hơn

Đến cuối kỳ, Ford giảm mạnh nhất

Từ khóa nên dùng:

showed a downward trend

declined significantly

remained lower

experienced fluctuations

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – General Motors & Ford

General Motors:

giảm đều từ khoảng 32 xuống khoảng 22 giờ

→ xu hướng giảm rõ rệt

Ford:

tăng nhẹ ban đầu (28 → \~31 vào 2001\)

sau đó giảm mạnh xuống khoảng 20 vào 2005

→ biến động rồi giảm mạnh

Ý chính: cả hai hãng Mỹ đều giảm thời gian sản xuất, đặc biệt Ford có sự sụt giảm đáng kể ở cuối kỳ

BODY 2 – Toyota & Honda

Toyota:

dao động nhẹ quanh 20–24 giờ

giảm nhẹ về khoảng 19 vào cuối kỳ

→ ổn định và tương đối thấp

Honda:

dao động nhưng nhìn chung giảm nhẹ (21 → \~19)

có đỉnh khoảng 24 vào 2002

→ biến động nhẹ

Ý chính: Toyota và Honda duy trì mức thời gian thấp hơn và ổn định hơn so với hai hãng còn lại

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

decline steadily

drop significantly

fluctuate slightly

remain relatively stable

record a peak

show a downward trend

Ví dụ:

The time required by General Motors declined steadily over the period.

Ford experienced a slight rise before dropping sharply.

Toyota’s figures fluctuated within a narrow range.

Honda recorded a peak in 2002 before declining again.

The line graph shows the average number of hours required to produce cars in the US by four manufacturers—General Motors, Ford, Toyota, and Honda—between 1998 and 2005\.

Overall, production time decreased for all companies over the period. General Motors and Ford started with the highest figures but recorded significant reductions, while Toyota and Honda consistently maintained lower production times.

In 1998, General Motors had the longest production time at just over 32 hours per vehicle, followed by Ford at around 28 hours. Both companies reduced their production time steadily, with General Motors falling to approximately 23 hours in 2005\. Ford initially rose to a peak of about 31 hours in 2001 before declining sharply to around 20 hours by the end of the period.

Toyota and Honda, in contrast, began with lower figures. Toyota fluctuated slightly, increasing from around 20 hours in 1998 to a peak of 24 hours in 2002, before declining to approximately 19 hours in 2005\. Honda showed a similar pattern of fluctuation, starting at about 21 hours, dropping to 18 hours in 1999, then rising to 24 hours in 2002, and finally decreasing again to around 18 hours in the final year.

By 2005, the production times of all four manufacturers had converged, with Ford and Toyota recording the lowest figures, followed closely by Honda and General Motors.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the percentage of the Australian workforce in five industrie...
prompt: The graph below shows the percentage of the Australian workforce in five industries between 1962 and 2012. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Line graph: Percentage of employment by sector (1962–2012)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ cho thấy tỷ lệ lao động (%) làm việc trong năm lĩnh vực: services, manufacturing, agriculture, construction và mining trong giai đoạn 1962–2012.

→ Dạng: line graph – multiple groups (so sánh \+ xu hướng theo thời gian)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

percentage of employment

sectors

workforce

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / compares

employment → workforce distribution

Mẫu:

The line graph illustrates the percentage of the workforce employed in five different sectors between 1962 and 2012\.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Services tăng mạnh và trở thành lĩnh vực lớn nhất

Manufacturing và agriculture giảm đáng kể

Construction tương đối ổn định

Mining luôn thấp nhất và ít biến động

Từ khóa nên dùng:

rose significantly

declined steadily

remained relatively stable

accounted for the smallest proportion

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – Nhóm chính (Services & Manufacturing)

Services:

tăng đều từ khoảng 52% lên gần 80%

→ tăng mạnh và chiếm ưu thế

Manufacturing:

giảm liên tục từ khoảng 27% xuống khoảng 10%

→ xu hướng giảm rõ rệt

Ý chính: lao động chuyển dịch mạnh từ manufacturing sang services

BODY 2 – Nhóm còn lại (Agriculture, Construction & Mining)

Agriculture:

giảm từ khoảng 12% xuống khoảng 4%

→ giảm đều

Construction:

dao động nhẹ quanh mức 9–10%

→ tương đối ổn định

Mining:

luôn rất thấp (khoảng 1–3%)

→ ít thay đổi và thấp nhất

Ý chính: các ngành còn lại chiếm tỷ trọng nhỏ hơn, trong đó agriculture giảm còn construction và mining khá ổn định

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

increase steadily

rise significantly

decline gradually

remain stable

account for

experience a downward trend

Ví dụ:

The proportion of workers in the service sector increased steadily over the period.

Manufacturing experienced a significant decline.

Agriculture showed a gradual decrease.

Construction remained relatively stable, while mining accounted for the smallest share.

The line graph illustrates the percentage distribution of employment across five sectors—services, manufacturing, agriculture, construction, and mining—between 1962 and 2012\.

Overall, the services sector increased steadily and became the dominant source of employment, while manufacturing and agriculture declined significantly. Construction remained relatively stable, and mining accounted for the smallest share throughout the period.

In 1962, services already represented the largest proportion at just over 50%, followed by manufacturing at around 27%. Over time, the share of services rose consistently, reaching approximately 78% in 2012\. In contrast, manufacturing experienced a continuous decline, falling from about 27% to around 10% by the end of the period.

Agriculture also showed a downward trend, decreasing steadily from roughly 12% in 1962 to just 4% in 2012\. Meanwhile, construction remained largely unchanged, fluctuating slightly around 9–10% throughout the years. Mining, although minor, increased marginally from about 2% to 3% between 1962 and 1992, before declining again to approximately 1% in the final year.

title: Line Graph: The line graph illustrates the number of fixed-line and mobile telephone subscribe...
prompt: The line graph illustrates the number of fixed-line and mobile telephone subscribers per 100 inhabitants in Africa between 1994 and 2004.Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Line graph: Telephone subscribers per 100 inhabitants, Africa (1994–2004)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ cho thấy số thuê bao điện thoại trên mỗi 100 người dân tại châu Phi, gồm hai loại: điện thoại cố định (fixed) và di động (mobile) trong giai đoạn 1994–2004.

→ Dạng: line graph – multiple groups (so sánh \+ xu hướng theo thời gian)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

telephone subscribers

per 100 inhabitants

Africa

fixed and mobile

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / compares

subscribers → users

Mẫu:

The line graph illustrates the number of telephone subscribers per 100 inhabitants in Africa between 1994 and 2004, divided into fixed and mobile users.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Cả hai loại đều tăng theo thời gian

Mobile tăng rất nhanh và vượt fixed vào khoảng 2001

Fixed tăng chậm và gần như ổn định

→ mobile trở thành loại phổ biến hơn vào cuối kỳ

Từ khóa nên dùng:

rose sharply

increased gradually

overtook

showed rapid growth

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – Mobile

Mobile:

tăng mạnh từ gần 0 lên khoảng 8.8

đặc biệt tăng nhanh sau năm 1999

→ tốc độ tăng nhanh nhất

Ý chính: mobile phát triển bùng nổ và trở thành loại chiếm ưu thế

BODY 2 – Fixed

Fixed:

tăng nhẹ từ khoảng 1.7 lên khoảng 3.1

có dao động nhỏ nhưng nhìn chung tăng chậm

→ xu hướng ổn định

So sánh:

ban đầu cao hơn nhiều so với mobile

nhưng bị vượt vào khoảng 2001

Ý chính: fixed tăng chậm và bị mobile vượt qua vào đầu những năm 2000

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

increase steadily

rise sharply

grow rapidly

overtake

remain relatively stable

experience slight fluctuations

Ví dụ:

Mobile phone subscriptions rose sharply over the period.

Fixed-line users increased gradually with minor fluctuations.

Mobile usage overtook fixed lines around 2001\.

By the end of the period, mobile phones had become the dominant form of communication.

The graph below gives information about telephone subscribers per 100 inhabitants in Africa from 1994-2004. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.

The line graph illustrates the number of telephone subscribers per 100 inhabitants in Africa between 1994 and 2004, divided into fixed-line and mobile users.

Overall, both types of telephone subscriptions increased over the period, but mobile usage grew far more rapidly and eventually surpassed fixed-line subscriptions. Fixed-line growth, in contrast, was relatively slow and modest.

In 1994, fixed-line subscriptions stood at about 1.7 per 100 people, while mobile usage was negligible at just 0.06. Over the following years, fixed-line figures rose gradually, reaching around 2.5 by 1999 and remaining relatively stable until 2000\. After that, they increased slightly to approximately 3.1 by 2004\.

Mobile subscriptions followed a very different pattern. Although they remained low in the mid-1990s, increasing only to about 1 per 100 inhabitants by 1999, growth accelerated significantly after 2000\. The figure doubled to around 2 in 2000 and reached 3 in 2001, at which point it equalled fixed-line usage. It then rose sharply to approximately 6 in 2003 and peaked at about 8.8 in 2004\.

By the end of the period, mobile phones had become the dominant form of telecommunication in Africa, far exceeding the number of fixed-line subscribers.

title: Line Graph: The average cost of monthly contract of four different cellular companies in one E...
prompt: The line graph shows the average cost of monthly contract of four different cellular companies in one European country from January to September in 2012, measured in euros. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Line graph: Monthly sales performance of four companies (Jan–Sep)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ cho thấy doanh số bán hàng hàng tháng của bốn công ty (Domo, Lex, Sim TX và Alpha) trong giai đoạn từ tháng 1 đến tháng 9\.

→ Dạng: line graph – multiple groups (so sánh \+ xu hướng theo thời gian ngắn)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

monthly sales

four companies

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / compares

sales performance → sales figures

Mẫu:

The line graph illustrates the monthly sales figures of four companies from January to September.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Domo luôn có doanh số cao nhất phần lớn thời gian

Lex tăng nhẹ và ổn định

Sim TX tăng rồi giảm

Alpha biến động mạnh và tăng vọt vào cuối kỳ

Từ khóa nên dùng:

remained the highest

increased steadily

fluctuated

rose sharply

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – Domo & Lex

Domo:

tăng từ 15 lên khoảng 25 vào tháng 7

sau đó giảm nhẹ về khoảng 22 vào tháng 9

→ xu hướng tăng rồi giảm nhẹ

Lex:

dao động nhẹ nhưng nhìn chung tăng từ khoảng 12 lên 18

→ tăng ổn định

Ý chính: Domo dẫn đầu trong khi Lex tăng đều nhưng ở mức thấp hơn

BODY 2 – Sim TX & Alpha

Sim TX:

tăng từ khoảng 8 lên đỉnh \~14 vào tháng 6

sau đó giảm dần xuống khoảng 7

→ xu hướng tăng rồi giảm

Alpha:

dao động mạnh, giảm xuống \~4 vào tháng 6

sau đó tăng vọt lên hơn 20 vào tháng 9

→ biến động lớn nhất

Ý chính: Sim TX không duy trì được đà tăng, trong khi Alpha có sự phục hồi mạnh vào cuối kỳ

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

increase steadily

rise gradually

fluctuate significantly

drop sharply

recover strongly

reach a peak

Ví dụ:

Domo’s sales increased steadily before declining slightly towards the end.

Lex showed a gradual upward trend.

Sim TX reached a peak in June before falling.

Alpha fluctuated significantly but rose sharply in the final months.

The line graph illustrates the monthly sales performance of four companies—Domo, Lex, Sim TX, and Alpha—from January to September.

Overall, Domo consistently recorded the highest sales figures, showing a general upward trend despite minor fluctuations. Lex also experienced steady growth, while Sim TX peaked منتصف the period before declining. In contrast, Alpha started with the lowest figures but rose sharply towards the end.

Domo began at 15 in January and increased gradually to 18 in March, before dipping slightly to 16 in April. Its sales then rose steadily, reaching a peak of 25 in July, followed by a slight decline to 22 by September. Lex showed moderate but consistent growth overall, starting at 12 in January, dropping to 10 in February, and then climbing steadily to 18 in September.

Sim TX followed a different pattern. Its sales fluctuated in the first half of the period, rising from 8 in January to a peak of 14 in June. However, this was followed by a decline, with figures falling to around 7 by September.

Alpha had the lowest starting point at 5 and remained relatively stable until March. After some fluctuation, including a drop to 4 in June, it increased sharply in the final months, reaching approximately 22 in September and nearly matching Domo.

title: Line Graph: The number of train passengers from 2000 to 2009
prompt:
The first graph shows the number of train passengers from 2000 to 2009. The second graph shows the percentage of trains running on time.
Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Mixed charts: Train passengers & On-time performance (2000–2009)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ gồm hai phần:

  • Biểu đồ 1: số lượng hành khách đi tàu (triệu người) từ 2000 đến 2009
  • Biểu đồ 2: tỷ lệ tàu chạy đúng giờ so với mục tiêu (95%) trong cùng giai đoạn

→ Dạng: mixed line graphs (mô tả 2 biểu đồ → cần overview chung \+ nhóm thông tin hợp lý)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

number of passengers

in millions

percentage of trains running on time

target

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / presents

compared with → in comparison with

Mẫu:

The charts illustrate the number of train passengers (in millions) and the percentage of trains running on time compared with the target between 2000 and 2009\.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Số hành khách dao động nhẹ nhưng nhìn chung ổn định

Tỷ lệ đúng giờ biến động quanh mức mục tiêu 95%

Có giai đoạn giảm rõ (2005–2006) rồi tăng mạnh cuối kỳ

→ không có xu hướng tăng/giảm rõ ràng ở passengers, nhưng on-time có biến động đáng chú ý

Từ khóa nên dùng:

fluctuated

remained relatively stable

hovered around

dropped noticeably

recovered

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – Train passengers

Passengers:

dao động trong khoảng 35–46 triệu

tăng từ 2000 đến đỉnh \~46 vào 2005

sau đó giảm nhẹ rồi ổn định quanh \~40–42

→ xu hướng: biến động nhẹ, không thay đổi lớn

Ý chính: lượng hành khách đạt đỉnh giữa kỳ rồi duy trì ổn định

BODY 2 – On-time performance

Target:

luôn cố định ở 95%

Actual performance:

tăng từ 92% lên 96% (2000–2004)

giảm xuống khoảng 92% vào 2006

sau đó tăng mạnh lên \~97% vào cuối kỳ

→ dao động quanh target, có lúc dưới và trên mức này

Ý chính: tỷ lệ đúng giờ không ổn định nhưng cải thiện rõ rệt vào cuối giai đoạn

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

fluctuate slightly

remain stable

reach a peak

drop noticeably

recover strongly

hover around

meet / exceed the target

Ví dụ:

The number of passengers fluctuated within a narrow range.

Passenger figures reached a peak in 2005 before stabilising.

The percentage of trains running on time dropped noticeably in 2006\.

It then recovered and exceeded the target in the final years.

The charts show the number of train passengers between 2000 and 2009, along with the percentage of trains running on time compared with a fixed target.

Overall, passenger numbers fluctuated moderately but showed a slight upward trend, while punctuality varied around the target, falling below it in some years before exceeding it towards the end of the period.

In 2000, around 36 million passengers used the train service. This figure rose to approximately 42 million in 2002, before dropping back to about 36 million in 2003\. Passenger numbers then increased again, peaking at roughly 46 million in 2005\. After this high point, the figure declined slightly and stabilised at around 40–42 million between 2006 and 2009\.

Regarding punctuality, the target remained constant at 95% throughout the period. The actual percentage started below target at around 92% in 2000 and improved steadily to reach the target in 2002\. It then exceeded the target slightly, peaking at about 96% in 2004, before declining again to a low of approximately 92% in 2006\. In the final years, punctuality improved significantly, reaching around 97% in both 2008 and 2009, thus clearly surpassing the target.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows four countries of residence of overseas students in Australia
prompt: The graph below shows four countries of residence of overseas students in Australia. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Line graph: Countries of residence of visitors for education (1982–2000)

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ cho thấy số lượng du học sinh (nghìn người) đến từ bốn quốc gia: Indonesia, Hong Kong, Malaysia và Singapore trong giai đoạn 1982–2000.

→ Dạng: line graph – multiple groups (so sánh \+ xu hướng dài hạn)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ các từ khóa:

number of students

countries of residence

education

time period

Có thể dùng:

shows → illustrates / compares

visitors → students

Mẫu:

The line graph illustrates the number of students from four countries who visited for educational purposes between 1982 and 2000, measured in thousands.

3. Overview (ý chính)

Indonesia tăng mạnh nhất và trở thành cao nhất vào cuối kỳ

Singapore tăng đều từ mức rất thấp

Malaysia tăng nhẹ và khá ổn định

Hong Kong tăng rồi giảm nhẹ vào cuối giai đoạn

Từ khóa nên dùng:

rose dramatically

increased steadily

remained relatively stable

fluctuated slightly

4. Chia BODY

BODY 1 – Indonesia & Singapore

Indonesia:

tăng liên tục từ gần 0 lên khoảng 23–25 nghìn

đặc biệt tăng mạnh sau 1994

→ tăng nhanh nhất và cao nhất

Singapore:

bắt đầu từ gần 0

tăng đều lên khoảng 19–20 vào 2000

→ tăng ổn định

Ý chính: cả hai nước đều tăng mạnh, đặc biệt Indonesia dẫn đầu rõ rệt

BODY 2 – Hong Kong & Malaysia

Hong Kong:

tăng từ 0 lên khoảng 18 vào cuối 1990s

sau đó giảm nhẹ trước khi tăng lại

→ xu hướng tăng nhưng có dao động

Malaysia:

bắt đầu khoảng 6–7

tăng nhẹ lên khoảng 15–16

→ ổn định hơn so với các nước khác

Ý chính: Hong Kong biến động nhẹ, trong khi Malaysia tăng chậm và ổn định

5. Gợi ý từ vựng

increase steadily

rise sharply

fluctuate

remain stable

reach a peak

experience growth

Ví dụ:

The number of students from Indonesia rose dramatically over the period.

Singapore experienced steady growth from a very low base.

Hong Kong showed some fluctuations towards the end of the period.

Malaysia remained relatively stable with gradual increases.

The line graph shows the number of students (in thousands) arriving for education from four countries—Indonesia, Hong Kong, Malaysia, and Singapore—between 1982 and 2000\.

Overall, student numbers from all countries increased over the period, with Indonesia experiencing the most dramatic growth, particularly after the mid-1990s. Malaysia showed a relatively steady rise, while Hong Kong and Singapore displayed more fluctuation before ending with upward trends.

In the early years, Malaysia had the highest number of students, starting at around 6,000 in 1982 and rising gradually to about 8,000 by 1990\. In contrast, Indonesia and Singapore recorded negligible figures initially, while Hong Kong remained very low until the late 1980s. From 1988 onwards, Hong Kong saw a sharp increase, reaching approximately 10,000 students by 1992, before stabilising briefly.

Indonesia followed a steady upward trend from near zero in 1982 to around 10,000 in 1994\. After that, it experienced a rapid surge, peaking at about 26,000 in 1998 before declining slightly to around 23,000 in 2000, remaining the largest source of students.

Singapore also grew gradually, particularly after 1990, rising from minimal numbers to approximately 20,000 by 2000\. Meanwhile, Malaysia increased steadily overall despite minor fluctuations, ending at around 16,000 students in the final year.

title: Line Graph: The charts show the changes in ownership of electrical appliances and amount of ti...
prompt: The charts show the changes in ownership of electrical appliances and amount of time spent doing housework in households in one country between 1920 and 2019. Summarise the information by se
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI (2 BIỂU ĐỒ KẾT HỢP)

1. Phân tích đề

Biểu đồ gồm 2 line graphs:

1. % hộ gia đình sở hữu thiết bị điện (washing machine, refrigerator, vacuum cleaner)

2. Số giờ làm việc nhà mỗi tuần

→ Dạng: mixed trends \+ relationship (cause–effect)

2. Introduction

The two line graphs illustrate the percentage of households owning three electrical appliances and the average number of hours of housework per week between 1920 and 2019.

3. Overview (QUAN TRỌNG)

  • Ownership of appliances increased significantly overall
  • Housework hours decreased dramatically
  • → Clear inverse relationship (thiết bị ↑ → việc nhà ↓)

4. Body 1 – Appliances

Refrigerator:

  • tăng mạnh nhất: 0% → 100% (2000)
  • gần như phổ cập hoàn toàn

Vacuum cleaner:

  • tăng đều: 30% → 100% (2000–2019)

Washing machine:

  • tăng nhưng có fluctuation
  • từ 40% → \~70%, giảm nhẹ năm 1980 rồi tăng lại

→ key: not all lines are perfectly linear

5. Body 2 – Housework hours

  • giảm liên tục: 50h → 10h/tuần
  • giảm mạnh nhất giai đoạn 1920–1960
  • sau đó giảm chậm hơn

→ strong downward trend

The charts illustrate the proportion of households owning three electrical appliances (washing machines, refrigerators and vacuum cleaners) from 1920 to 2019, alongside the average weekly hours of housework over the same period.

Overall, ownership of all appliances increased substantially, with refrigerators and vacuum cleaners becoming almost universal by the end of the period. In contrast, the amount of time spent on housework declined dramatically.

Refrigerator ownership rose most sharply, from virtually 0% in 1920 to around 90% in 1960, reaching full penetration by 2000 and remaining at that level in 2019. Vacuum cleaner ownership also grew steadily, from about 30% in 1920 to 70% in 1960, before reaching 100% by 2000. Washing machines followed a more moderate trend, increasing from 40% in 1920 to roughly 70% in 1960, dipping slightly to just over 60% in 1980, and then rising again to approximately 75% in 2019.

Meanwhile, the number of hours of housework per household fell consistently. It dropped from around 50 hours per week in 1920 to 35 hours in 1940, and then to 20 hours in 1960. After a smaller decline to about 15 hours in 1980, the figure remained stable in 2000 before decreasing further to just 10 hours per week by 2019.

title: Line Graph: The graph shows the percentage of people in different age groups in one city who a...
prompt: The graph shows the percentage of people in different age groups in one city who attended music concerts between 2010 and 2015. Summarize the information by reporting the main features, and making comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

The percentage of people visiting the cinema once a month or more between 1984 and 2003

1. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện tỷ lệ người đi xem phim ít nhất một lần mỗi tháng trong giai đoạn 1984–2003, chia theo 4 nhóm tuổi.

→ Dạng: line graph (time series \+ multiple groups)

2. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates the percentage of people from four different age groups who visited the cinema at least once a month between 1984 and 2003.

3. Overview (ý chính)

  • Tất cả các nhóm tuổi đều có xu hướng tăng theo thời gian
  • Nhóm 15–24 luôn cao nhất, trong khi 35+ thấp nhất
  • Khoảng cách giữa các nhóm khá rõ rệt và duy trì ổn định

### 4. Cách chia BODY

Nên chia theo nhóm tuổi (grouping), không đi theo năm

BODY 1 – Nhóm trẻ (15–24 & 7–14)

  • Nhóm 15–24:

→ tăng mạnh từ khoảng 15% (1984) lên hơn 50% (2003)

→ có dao động nhưng xu hướng chung là tăng rõ rệt

  • Nhóm 7–14:

→ tăng từ khoảng 10% lên khoảng 30%

→ cũng có biến động nhẹ nhưng nhìn chung đi lên

→ Key idea:

  • Hai nhóm trẻ có mức độ tham gia cao nhất và tăng mạnh nhất

### BODY 2 – Nhóm lớn tuổi hơn (25–35 & 35+)

  • Nhóm 25–35:

→ tăng dần từ khoảng 5% lên gần 30%

  • Nhóm 35+:

→ thấp nhất, tăng nhẹ từ \~1% lên khoảng 13%

→ Key idea:

  • Nhóm lớn tuổi ít đi xem phim hơn, nhưng vẫn có xu hướng tăng

### 5. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm

Trend verbs:

  • increase / rise / climb
  • fluctuate
  • remain the highest / lowest

Useful structures:

  • showed an upward trend
  • experienced a significant increase
  • remained consistently higher than
  • saw a gradual rise

So sánh:

  • considerably higher than
  • by contrast
  • in comparison

Ví dụ câu:

  • The figure for the 15–24 group rose significantly over the period.
  • In contrast, the 35+ group remained the lowest despite a gradual increase.
  • Younger people were consistently more frequent cinema-goers than older groups.

The line graph illustrates the proportion of people in four age groups who went to the cinema at least once a month between 1984 and 2003.

Overall, cinema attendance increased across all age groups over the period, with the 15–24 group consistently recording the highest figures, while those aged 35 and over remained the least frequent visitors.

In 1984, around 15% of people aged 15–24 visited the cinema monthly, compared to approximately 10% for the 7–14 group and about 5% for those aged 25–35. The figure for the oldest group was negligible, at roughly 1%. Over time, all groups experienced an upward trend, although there were some fluctuations.

The most notable growth occurred among 15–24-year-olds, whose participation rose sharply to around 50% in the late 1990s and peaked at approximately 56% in 2002, before slightly declining by the end of the period. A similar but less dramatic increase was observed among the 7–14 group, climbing to nearly 38% in 2002 before falling to about 30% in 2003.

Meanwhile, the 25–35 group showed steady growth overall, reaching just over 30% in the early 2000s, despite a temporary dip around 2000. In contrast, the 35-and-over group experienced the slowest rise, increasing gradually from about 1% to roughly 13% by 2003.

title: Map: The museum's plant in 1998 and after some changes were made in 2008
prompt: The picture below shows the museum’s plant in 1998 and after some changes were made in 2008. Summarize the information by describing the main features of the charts and making comparisons where appropriate.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Museum floor plan (1998 vs 2008\)
1\. Giải thích đề

Sơ đồ cho thấy bố trí bảo tàng vào 1998 và 2008.

→ Dạng: map – changes over time

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)
  • Giữ: layout / floor plan – museum – two years
  • Dùng:
shows → illustrates / compares* changes → modifications / redevelopment*
3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Layout thay đổi đáng kể (major redevelopment)
  • Thêm nhiều tiện ích cho khách (restaurant, fountains, shops)
  • Không gian được tổ chức lại rõ ràng hơn
4\. Chia BODY
BODY 1 – Khu trung tâm & chức năng chính
  • Garden → fountains (thay đổi lớn)
  • Cafe giữ nhưng đổi vị trí
  • Entrance vẫn ở trung tâm dưới (giữ nguyên)

→ Ý: khu trung tâm được nâng cấp & hiện đại hóa

BODY 2 – Các khu xung quanh
  • Thêm restaurant (trái trên)
  • Shop → shops (mở rộng)
  • WC đổi vị trí (lên trên)
  • Cloakroom giữ nhưng di chuyển
  • Temporary exhibition: vẫn giữ

→ Ý: tăng tiện ích \+ thay đổi vị trí các phòng

5\. Gợi ý từ vựng
  • be replaced by → được thay thế bởi
  • be relocated → được di chuyển
  • be added → được thêm vào
  • remain unchanged → giữ nguyên
  • undergo significant changes → trải qua thay đổi lớn

Ví dụ:

  • The garden was replaced by a fountain area.
  • Several new facilities were added, including a restaurant and shops.
  • The entrance remained unchanged.

The diagrams compare the layout of a museum in 1998 and 2008\.

Overall, the museum underwent a substantial reorganisation over the ten-year period. The central garden was replaced with fountains, new facilities such as a restaurant and additional shops were introduced, and several existing areas were relocated or expanded.

In 1998, the museum had a relatively simple layout. A garden occupied the centre, with a café positioned directly above it. On the lower level, the ticket entrance was located in the middle, flanked by a temporary exhibition room on the left and a shop on the right. A cloakroom and WC were situated in the bottom-right corner. Two permanent exhibition rooms were located on either side of the central area.

By 2008, the layout had become more complex and visitor-oriented. The garden was replaced by fountains, creating a redesigned central feature. The café remained but was reduced in size and moved slightly, while a new restaurant was added to the upper-left corner. The WC was relocated next to the café at the top.

On the ground level, the entrance area became larger, and the cloakroom was moved to the bottom centre. The single shop was replaced by multiple shops in the bottom-left corner. The temporary exhibition room remained on the left but was slightly repositioned. Meanwhile, the permanent exhibition area on the right was expanded significantly, occupying a larger portion of the floor plan.

title: Map: The two plans below show student accommodation in 2010 and now
prompt: The two plans below show student accommodation in 2010 and now. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Student accommodation (2010 vs Now)
1\. Giải thích đề

Sơ đồ cho thấy sự thay đổi trong khu nhà ở sinh viên từ 2010 đến hiện tại.

→ Dạng: map – changes over time

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)
  • Giữ: diagrams – changes – student accommodation – two time points
  • Dùng:
show → illustrate / compare* now → at present / currently*
3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Tăng số lượng phòng ngủ rõ rệt
  • Giảm không gian chung (living room bị thay thế)
  • Thêm tiện ích mới (en-suite, car park)
4\. Chia BODY
BODY 1 – Khu bên trong (core changes)
  • Living room → bị thay bằng bedroom
  • Số bedroom tăng (từ \~3 → \~5)
  • Bathroom & kitchen: giữ nguyên vị trí
  • Thêm en-suite room

→ Ý: tối ưu hoá chỗ ở → nhiều phòng hơn, ít không gian chung

BODY 2 – Khu bên ngoài & bố cục
  • Garden: giảm diện tích / bố trí lại
  • Thêm car parking (khu mới hoàn toàn)
  • Layout nhìn chung chặt chẽ hơn

→ Ý: ngoại cảnh bị thu hẹp để phục vụ tiện ích mới

5\. Gợi ý từ vựng
  • be converted into → được chuyển thành
  • be replaced by → được thay thế
  • be expanded → được mở rộng
  • be reduced → bị thu hẹp
  • additional facilities → tiện ích bổ sung

Ví dụ:

  • The living room was converted into an additional bedroom.
  • The number of bedrooms increased significantly.
  • Outdoor space was reduced to make room for a car park.

The diagrams illustrate how a student accommodation building has changed between 2010 and the present.

Overall, the layout has been modified to accommodate more students. Communal space has been reduced, while the number of bedrooms has increased. In addition, some facilities have been upgraded, and a car parking area has been introduced.

In 2010, the accommodation included a living room in the upper-left area, alongside two student bedrooms on the top and right sides. There was another bedroom in the lower-left corner, making a total of three bedrooms. A bathroom was located centrally, and a kitchen was positioned on the right side. The building was surrounded by a garden on three sides.

At present, the living room has been removed and replaced with additional student bedrooms, increasing the total number to five. The kitchen remains in the same location, and the bathroom is still centrally positioned. However, an en-suite room has been added in the bottom-right corner, replacing part of the former bedroom space.

Externally, the garden area has been reduced, particularly at the bottom, where it has been replaced by a car parking space.

title: Map: The development of the village of Ryemouth between 1995 and present
prompt: The map below shows the development of the village of Ryemouth between 1995 and present. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Village of Ryemouth (1995 vs Present)
1\. Giải thích đề

Sơ đồ cho thấy sự phát triển của ngôi làng Ryemouth từ năm 1995 đến hiện tại.

→ Dạng: map – changes over time

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

Giữ: village – development – between 1995 and present

Dùng:

  • shows → illustrates / compares
  • present → nowadays / at present
3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Khu vực chuyển từ nông nghiệp và đánh bắt → du lịch và dịch vụ
  • Ven biển được tái phát triển mạnh (apartments, restaurant)
  • Xuất hiện khu giải trí mới (golf, tennis)
4\. Chia BODY
BODY 1 – Khu phía Đông (big transformation)
  • Farmland → golf course
  • Forest park → tennis courts

→ Ý: chuyển đổi sang recreational purposes (giải trí)

BODY 2 – Khu ven biển & trung tâm
  • Fish market \+ fishing port → bị xoá bỏ hoàn toàn
  • Shop → restaurant
  • Xuất hiện apartments dọc bờ biển
  • Hotel vẫn giữ, thêm car park
  • Cafe: không thay đổi vị trí

→ Ý: chuyển từ đánh bắt → du lịch và thương mại

5\. Gợi ý từ vựng
  • be converted into → được chuyển thành
  • be replaced by → được thay thế
  • be removed → bị loại bỏ
  • be redeveloped → được tái phát triển
  • be introduced → được bổ sung

The maps illustrate how the village of Ryemouth has changed from 1995 to the present.

Overall, the village has undergone significant redevelopment, with a shift from a fishing-based economy towards residential and tourism functions. Several original features have been removed or repurposed, while new facilities have been introduced.

In 1995, Ryemouth featured traditional coastal activities and open land. A fish market and fishing port were located along the shoreline, with a row of shops nearby. To the northeast, there was farmland and a forest park, while housing was concentrated in the northwest. A hotel stood close to the forest park, and a café was positioned near the coast.

At present, many of these features have been replaced. The fishing port and fish market have disappeared, making way for apartment buildings along the coast. The former shops have been converted into restaurants. The farmland and forest park have been redeveloped into recreational areas, including a golf course and tennis courts.

A car park has also been added next to the hotel, which remains in the same location. The café is still present but appears slightly repositioned.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the percentages of tourists who used different types of tran...
prompt: The graph below shows the percentages of tourists who used different types of transport to travel within a particular nation between 1989 and 2009. Each tourist may have used more than one type of transport. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Percentage of Tourists Using Different Types of Transport (1989–2009)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện tỷ lệ khách du lịch (%) sử dụng 5 phương tiện giao thông:

car, rail, air, coach, ferry trong giai đoạn 1989–2009.

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ comparison)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates the percentage of tourists using five different types of transport between 1989 and 2009\.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Car cao nhất trong phần lớn thời gian nhưng giảm về cuối
  • Rail tăng đều và trở thành phổ biến nhất vào 2009
  • Air giảm liên tục
  • Coach tăng ổn định
  • Ferry thấp nhất và biến động nhẹ
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo tăng vs giảm/dao động

BODY 1 – Rail & Coach (tăng)
  • Rail:

→ tăng từ \~35 lên \~58

→ tăng liên tục, không giảm

→ vượt car vào cuối kỳ

  • Coach:

→ tăng từ \~9 lên \~25

→ tăng đều qua từng giai đoạn

→ Key idea:

  • Rail và coach đều tăng, đặc biệt rail trở thành phương tiện phổ biến nhất
BODY 2 – Car, Air & Ferry
  • Car:

→ tăng từ \~46 lên \~63 (1999)

→ sau đó giảm xuống \~52 (2009)

  • Air:

→ giảm liên tục từ \~39 xuống \~21

  • Ferry:

→ tăng nhẹ đến \~12 (2004) rồi giảm còn \~9 (2009)

→ Key idea:

  • Car giảm nhẹ về cuối, air giảm rõ rệt, ferry dao động nhẹ ở mức thấp
5\. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm
Trend:
  • increase steadily
  • decline gradually
  • peak at
  • fluctuate slightly
Structure:
  • became the most popular means of transport
  • showed a steady upward trend
  • experienced a gradual decline
  • reached a peak before falling
So sánh:
  • whereas / while
  • in contrast
  • compared with
Ví dụ câu:
  • Rail usage increased steadily and became the most popular by 2009\.
  • Car use peaked in 1999 before declining slightly.
  • Air travel showed a consistent downward trend over the period.

The line graph compares the percentage of tourists using five types of transport—car, rail, air, coach and ferry—between 1989 and 2009\.

Overall, cars and rail were the most popular means of transport throughout the period. Rail usage increased steadily and eventually overtook cars, while air travel declined gradually. Coach use rose consistently, whereas ferry remained the least common option with minor fluctuations.

In 1989, cars were the dominant mode at about 46%, followed by air at around 39% and rail at roughly 35%. Car usage rose to a peak of approximately 63% in 1999 before declining to about 52% by 2009\. By contrast, rail increased steadily from 35% to around 58% over the period, becoming the most popular option at the end.

Air travel showed a continuous downward trend, falling from about 39% in 1989 to just over 20% in 2009\. Coach usage, on the other hand, grew gradually from roughly 9% to 25%. Ferry use remained comparatively low, rising from around 5% to a peak of 12% in 2004 before dropping slightly to about 9% in the final year.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the changes in the birth rates for women in 6 different age ...
prompt:
The graph below shows the changes in the birth rates for women in 6 different age groups in the UK from 1973 to 2008.
Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Birth rates by age group (1973–2008)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường cho thấy tỷ lệ sinh (trên 1.000 phụ nữ) ở 6 nhóm tuổi trong giai đoạn 1973–2008.

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ multiple groups)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates birth rates among six different age groups between 1973 and 2008\.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Nhóm 25–29 luôn cao nhất, dù có biến động
  • 20–24 giảm đều theo thời gian
  • 30–34 và 35–39 tăng đáng kể
  • Under 20 và 40+ đều giảm liên tục
  • Xu hướng chung: dịch chuyển sinh con sang nhóm tuổi lớn hơn
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo giảm vs tăng \+ nhóm nổi bật

BODY 1 – Nhóm cao & giảm (25–29, 20–24)
  • 25–29:

→ bắt đầu khoảng 140 (1973)

→ giảm rồi tăng lại (peak \~134 năm 1993\)

→ kết thúc khoảng 120

→ luôn cao nhất

  • 20–24:

→ giảm đều từ \~130 xuống \~90

→ Key idea:

  • Nhóm trẻ (20–29) từng chiếm ưu thế, nhưng 20–24 giảm rõ rệt
BODY 2 – Nhóm tăng & nhóm thấp
  • 30–34:

→ tăng đều từ \~70 lên \~87

  • 35–39:

→ tăng mạnh từ \~40 lên \~65

  • Under 20:

→ giảm từ \~60 xuống \~37

  • 40+:

→ giảm liên tục từ \~20 xuống \~5

→ Key idea:

  • Nhóm 30+ tăng rõ rệt, trong khi nhóm rất trẻ và rất lớn tuổi giảm
5\. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm
Trend:
  • increase steadily
  • decline gradually
  • fluctuate
  • rise significantly
Structure:
  • remained the highest throughout
  • showed a downward trend
  • experienced a steady increase
  • fell consistently over the period
So sánh:
  • whereas / while
  • in contrast
  • compared with
Ví dụ câu:
  • The 25–29 group remained the highest despite some fluctuations.
  • Birth rates among women aged 20–24 declined steadily.
  • In contrast, the figures for the 30–34 and 35–39 groups increased significantly.

The line graph illustrates birth rates per 1,000 women across six age groups between 1973 and 2008\.

Overall, women aged 25–29 consistently recorded the highest birth rates, although their figures fluctuated slightly. In contrast, the youngest (under 20\) and oldest (40 and over) groups experienced steady declines. Meanwhile, birth rates for women aged 30–34 and 35–39 increased over time, indicating a shift towards later childbearing.

In 1973, the highest rate was among women aged 25–29 at about 140 births per 1,000, followed by those aged 20–24 at around 130\. Both groups declined over the period, with the 20–24 group falling more steadily to approximately 90 by 2008\. The 25–29 group fluctuated, peaking again at around 135 in 1993 before settling at about 120 in the final year.

By contrast, the 30–34 group rose consistently from roughly 70 in 1973 to about 87 in 2008\. Similarly, the 35–39 group increased from around 40 to approximately 65, with the most notable growth occurring after 1988\.

The under-20 group declined gradually from about 60 to under 40, while the 40-and-over group fell steadily from around 20 to just 5 births per 1,000 women by 2008\.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the number of immigrants to three countries from 1991 to 2001
prompt:
The graph below shows the number of immigrants to three countries from 1991 to 2001.
Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Number of immigrants to USA, Canada and Australia (1991–2001)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường minh họa số lượng người nhập cư (nghìn người) vào Mỹ, Canada và Úc trong giai đoạn 1991–2001.

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ comparison between countries)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates the number of immigrants (in thousands) to the USA, Canada and Australia between 1991 and 2001\.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • USA luôn cao nhất, nhưng giảm mạnh sau 1992 rồi dao động
  • Canada tăng nhẹ nhìn chung, đặc biệt tăng rõ vào cuối kỳ
  • Australia thấp nhất, nhưng có xu hướng tăng dần về cuối
  • Xu hướng chung: USA giảm rồi phục hồi nhẹ, trong khi 2 nước còn lại tăng
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo:

  • USA (dominant \+ fluctuation)
  • Canada & Australia (lower \+ upward trends)
BODY 1 – USA
  • bắt đầu khoảng 1400 (1991)
