  • đạt đỉnh \~1800 (1992)
  • sau đó giảm mạnh xuống \~1000 (1993)
  • tiếp tục giảm nhẹ đến \~750 (1996)
  • dao động quanh 700–900
  • kết thúc khoảng \~950 (2001)

→ Key idea:

  • giảm mạnh ban đầu, sau đó fluctuate và hồi nhẹ cuối kỳ
BODY 2 – Canada & Australia
Canada:
  • tăng từ \~200 lên \~300 (1994)
  • giảm nhẹ giai đoạn giữa (\~230–250)
  • sau đó tăng mạnh lên \~480 (2001)
Australia:
  • giảm nhẹ từ \~70 xuống \~30 (1995)
  • sau đó tăng đều
  • kết thúc khoảng \~90 (2001)

→ Key idea:

  • Canada: overall upward trend
  • Australia: U-shape (giảm rồi tăng lại)
5\. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm
Trend:
  • peak at
  • drop sharply
  • fluctuate
  • recover
  • rise steadily
Structure:
  • remained the highest throughout
  • experienced a sharp decline
  • showed an overall increase
  • reached a low of
So sánh:
  • in contrast
  • meanwhile
  • compared with
Ví dụ câu:
  • The USA recorded the highest figures throughout the period despite a sharp fall after 1992\.
  • Immigration to Canada showed an overall upward trend, especially towards the end of the period.
  • By contrast, Australia remained the lowest, although it increased gradually after the mid-1990s.

The line graph compares the number of immigrants (in thousands) to the USA, Canada and Australia between 1991 and 2001\.

Overall, the USA received by far the highest number of immigrants throughout the period, despite notable fluctuations. Canada showed a steady upward trend overall, while Australia remained the least popular destination with relatively low and stable figures.

In 1991, the USA attracted about 1,400 thousand immigrants, rising sharply to a peak of around 1,800 thousand in 1992\. This was followed by a significant drop to just under 1,000 thousand in 1993, after which the figure fluctuated between roughly 700 and 900 thousand for the rest of the decade, before increasing again to about 950 thousand in 2001\.

Canada, by contrast, experienced gradual growth. Starting at approximately 200 thousand in 1991, the number increased steadily to around 300 thousand by 1994\. Although there was a slight dip in the mid-1990s, immigration figures rose again towards the end of the period, reaching nearly 500 thousand in 2001\.

Australia consistently recorded the lowest figures. Immigration decreased from about 70 thousand in 1991 to around 30 thousand in 1994, then rose gradually, ending the period at approximately 90 thousand in 2001\.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the percentage of people visiting a museum at least once a y...
prompt: The graph below shows the percentage of people visiting a museum at least once a year between 1980 and 2010. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

The percentage of people visiting a museum (1980–2010)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường cho thấy tỷ lệ người đi bảo tàng ít nhất 1 lần/năm ở 4 nhóm tuổi:

  • 15–24
  • 25–34
  • 35–49
  • 50+

trong giai đoạn 1980–2010

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ multiple groups)

2\. Introduction

The line graph illustrates the percentage of people in four age groups who visited a museum at least once a year between 1980 and 2010\.

3\. Overview (quan trọng nhất)
  • Nhóm 50+ luôn cao nhất, nhưng giảm dần theo thời gian
  • Nhóm 15–24 thấp nhất, dao động nhẹ
  • Nhóm 25–34 và 35–49 giảm vào 1990 rồi tăng lại
  • Xu hướng chung:

→ peak around 1990 → dip → recovery → slight decline at the end

4\. BODY STRUCTURE

→ Chia hợp lý:

  • Body 1: 50+ (dominant) \+ overall pattern
  • Body 2: 3 nhóm còn lại (so sánh \+ biến động)
BODY 1 – Age 50+
  • bắt đầu khoảng 46% (1980)
  • tăng nhẹ lên \~49% (1990)
  • sau đó giảm dần đều
  • kết thúc khoảng 41% (2010)

→ Key:

  • highest throughout
  • gradual downward trend after 1990
BODY 2 – Other groups
25–34 & 35–49:
  • đều giảm mạnh về \~29% (1990)
  • sau đó phục hồi lên \~35–38% (1995–2005)
  • rồi giảm nhẹ cuối kỳ
15–24:
  • thấp nhất (\~20%)
  • tăng nhẹ đến \~25% (1990)
  • dao động nhẹ
  • giảm về \~21% (2010)

→ Key:

  • U-shape pattern (decline → recovery → slight fall)
  • relatively stable compared to 50+
5\. TỪ VỰNG ĂN ĐIỂM
Trend:
  • peak at
  • dip to
  • recover to
  • decline gradually
  • remain relatively stable
Structure:
  • remained the highest throughout
  • experienced a noticeable drop
  • saw a recovery afterwards
  • ended the period at

The line graph illustrates the proportion of people in four age groups who visited a museum at least once a year between 1980 and 2010\.

Overall, people aged 50 and over consistently recorded the highest participation rates, while the 15–24 group had the lowest. Most groups experienced a decline around 1990, followed by a recovery in the mid-1990s, before generally stabilising or slightly decreasing towards the end of the period.

In detail, the figure for those aged 50+ rose from about 46% in 1980 to a peak of nearly 49% in 1990, after which it gradually declined to approximately 41% by 2010\. Similarly, the 35–49 group fell from around 37% in 1980 to 29% in 1990, then rebounded sharply to about 38% in 1995, remaining relatively stable before ending at roughly 36%.

For younger adults, the percentage of 25–34-year-olds decreased from 35% in 1980 to 29% in 1990, before recovering to around 35% and then edging down slightly to 33% by 2010\. The 15–24 group followed a similar but lower pattern, rising from 20% to 25% between 1980 and 1990, then fluctuating modestly and finishing at just above 20% in the final year.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows how elderly people in the United States spent their free tim...
prompt: The graph below shows how elderly people in the United States spent their free time between 1980 and 2010. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Free Time Activities of US Elders (1980–2010)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường cho thấy tỷ lệ người cao tuổi ở Mỹ tham gia các hoạt động giải trí gồm:

  • Reading
  • Theatre
  • Online
  • Hiking
  • Watching TV

trong giai đoạn 1980–2010

→ Dạng: line graph (multiple categories over time)

2\. Introduction

The line graph illustrates the percentages of US elderly people engaging in five different leisure activities between 1980 and 2010\.

3\. Overview
  • Watching TV luôn cao nhất, dù giảm nhẹ cuối kỳ
  • Hiking tăng mạnh nhất, trở thành cao nhất vào năm 2010
  • Online tăng nhanh về cuối kỳ
  • Reading dao động mạnh
  • Theatre giảm rồi tăng lại nhẹ

→ Xu hướng chính:

  • shift từ passive → active/modern activities
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia hợp lý:

  • Body 1: Watching TV \+ Hiking (dominant \+ strong trend)
  • Body 2: Remaining activities (Reading, Theatre, Online)
BODY 1
Watching TV:
  • bắt đầu \~60% (1980)
  • tăng lên 70% (2000)
  • giảm nhẹ còn \~65% (2010)

→ stable \+ slight decline

Hiking:
  • tăng mạnh từ 20% → 80%
  • vượt tất cả vào cuối kỳ

→ strongest growth

BODY 2
Reading:
  • 30 → 40 → giảm mạnh xuống 20 (2000)
  • sau đó tăng mạnh lên 60 (2010)

→ highly fluctuating

Theatre:
  • giảm từ 50 → 30 (1990)
  • tăng lại dần lên \~45 (2010)

→ decline then recovery

Online:
  • rất thấp ban đầu (5%)
  • tăng nhẹ → tăng mạnh cuối kỳ (50%)

→ late but rapid growth

5\. Từ vựng ăn điểm
Trend:
  • rise sharply
  • fluctuate significantly
  • decline slightly
  • recover gradually
  • overtake
Structure:
  • remained the most popular activity
  • saw the most dramatic increase
  • experienced considerable fluctuations
  • ended the period at

The line graph compares the percentages of elderly people in the US who engaged in five different leisure activities—reading, theatre, online activities, hiking, and watching TV—between 1980 and 2010\.

Overall, watching TV remained one of the most popular activities throughout the period, although it declined slightly at the end. Hiking and online activities showed the most significant increases, while theatre attendance fluctuated moderately. Reading, by contrast, experienced notable variation before ending at a relatively high level.

In 1980, watching TV was the dominant activity at around 60%, followed by theatre at 50%. Reading accounted for 30%, while hiking and online activities were much less common at 20% and 5% respectively. By 1990, reading and hiking had both risen to 40%, while TV viewing increased to 65%. Theatre participation dropped sharply to 30%, and online activity remained low at 10%.

In 2000, TV peaked at approximately 70%, whereas hiking climbed to 60%. Theatre attendance recovered to 40%, but reading declined significantly to 20%. Online activity grew modestly to about 15%. By 2010, hiking became the most popular activity at 80%, while reading rebounded sharply to 60%. Online participation rose dramatically to 50%, overtaking theatre, which increased slightly to 45%. Meanwhile, TV viewing declined to around 65%.

title: Line Graph: The graph below gives information about the price of bananas in four countries bet...
prompt: The graph below gives information about the price of bananas in four countries between 1996 and 2004. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Prices of bananas in four countries (1996–2004)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường cho thấy giá chuối (USD/kg) tại Nhật Bản, Pháp, Đức và Mỹ trong giai đoạn 1996–2004.

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ comparison across countries)

2\. Introduction

The line graph illustrates the price of bananas (in US dollars per kilogram) in Japan, France, Germany and the USA from 1996 to 2004\.

3\. Overview
  • Japan luôn có giá cao nhất và biến động mạnh
  • USA thấp nhất và ổn định nhất
  • France khá ổn định quanh mức 2 USD/kg
  • Germany dao động nhưng có xu hướng tăng nhẹ

→ Xu hướng chung:

  • strong fluctuation (Japan) vs stability (USA, France)
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia hợp lý:

  • Body 1: Japan (dominant \+ volatile)
  • Body 2: France, Germany, USA (stable \+ comparison)
BODY 1 – Japan
  • bắt đầu \~2 USD/kg (1996)
  • tăng lên 3 (1998)
  • giảm mạnh xuống 2 (1999)
  • dao động liên tục
  • chạm đáy \~1.5 (2003)
  • tăng lại \~2.5 (2004)

→ Key:

  • highest but highly fluctuating
BODY 2 – France, Germany, USA
France:
  • gần như ổn định quanh 2 USD/kg
  • giảm nhẹ 1999 (\~1.5) rồi phục hồi
Germany:
  • bắt đầu 1.5
  • giảm nhẹ rồi tăng dần
  • đạt \~2 (2002) rồi giảm nhẹ
USA:
  • thấp nhất (\~1–1.3)
  • dao động rất nhỏ
  • gần như ổn định toàn kỳ

→ Key:

  • France: stable
  • Germany: slight upward trend
  • USA: lowest \+ minimal change
5\. Từ vựng ăn điểm
Trend:
  • fluctuate considerably
  • remain stable
  • rise slightly
  • fall sharply
  • recover
Structure:
  • recorded the highest prices
  • showed minimal variation
  • followed a similar pattern
  • remained relatively unchanged

The line graph compares changes in the price of a product (measured in US dollars per kilogram) in Japan, France, Germany and the USA between 1996 and 2004\.

Overall, Japan consistently recorded the highest and most volatile prices, while the USA remained the lowest and most stable market. France showed relatively minor fluctuations, whereas Germany experienced moderate variation with a gradual upward trend over time.

In Japan, prices rose from about $2.0/kg in 1996 to a peak of $3.0 in 1998, before dropping sharply to $2.0 in 1999\. They then fluctuated, reaching around $2.5 in 2000, dipping again in 2001, and ending at approximately $2.5 in 2004 despite a brief fall in 2003\.

France maintained a comparatively steady pattern, remaining close to $2.0/kg throughout the period. There was a slight dip to about $1.5 in 1999, followed by a recovery to around $2.0 by 2000, after which prices hovered just below or at this level.

Germany started at roughly $1.5/kg, fell to $1.2 in 1997, and then climbed to around $1.8 in 1998\. Although it dropped again in 1999, prices generally increased afterwards, peaking at about $2.0 in 2002 before stabilising at around $1.7 by 2004\.

In contrast, the USA recorded the lowest prices, beginning at $1.0/kg and showing only slight fluctuations. Prices rose modestly to around $1.3 in 1998, remained relatively stable thereafter, and finished at approximately $1.2 in 2004\.

title: Line Graph: The graph shows the number of people taking part in 4 kinds of sports in a particu...
prompt: The graph shows the number of people taking part in 4 kinds of sports in a particular region between 1985 and 2005. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Number of people taking part in 4 kinds of sports (1985–2005)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện số người tham gia 4 môn thể thao:

  • Basketball
  • Tennis
  • Badminton
  • Rugby

trong giai đoạn 1985–2005

→ Đơn vị: number of people

→ Dạng: line graph (comparison \+ trend over time)

2\. Introduction

The line graph illustrates the number of people participating in four different sports between 1985 and 2005\.

3\. Overview
  • Tennis tăng đều và trở thành cao nhất vào cuối kỳ
  • Rugby giảm mạnh nhất, từ cao nhất xuống thấp nhất
  • Basketball dao động nhẹ, khá ổn định
  • Badminton luôn thấp và biến động nhỏ

→ Xu hướng chính:

  • rise (tennis) vs sharp decline (rugby)
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia hợp lý:

  • Body 1: Tennis \+ Rugby (2 xu hướng đối lập rõ nhất)
  • Body 2: Basketball \+ Badminton (nhóm ổn định hơn)
BODY 1
Tennis:
  • tăng từ 150 (1985)
  • lên \~200 (1995)
  • tiếp tục tăng \~220 (2005)

→ steady upward trend

Rugby:
  • cao nhất ban đầu \~235 (1985)
  • giảm dần qua các năm
  • giảm mạnh còn 50 (2005)

→ dramatic decline

BODY 2
Basketball:
  • dao động quanh 70–90
  • tăng nhẹ đến 1995 (\~85)
  • ổn định rồi giảm nhẹ cuối kỳ

→ relatively stable

Badminton:
  • thấp nhất (\~50)
  • giảm nhẹ 1990 (\~40)
  • sau đó phục hồi và ổn định

→ minor fluctuations

5\. Từ vựng ăn điểm
Trend:
  • increase steadily
  • decline sharply
  • remain stable
  • fluctuate slightly
  • drop dramatically
Structure:
  • showed a consistent rise
  • experienced a significant fall
  • remained relatively unchanged
  • ended the period at

The line graph shows the number of people participating in four different sports—basketball, tennis, badminton and rugby—between 1985 and 2005\.

Overall, tennis experienced a steady increase and became the most popular sport by the end of the period, whereas rugby saw a sharp decline. Basketball and badminton fluctuated slightly but remained relatively stable compared to the other two activities.

In 1985, rugby had the highest participation at approximately 235 people, followed by tennis at 150\. Basketball and badminton were less popular, with about 80 and 55 participants respectively. Over the next decade, tennis rose steadily to around 200 in 1995, equalling rugby, which had declined to the same level. During this time, basketball increased modestly to about 90, while badminton fluctuated between 40 and 50\.

After 1995, tennis continued to grow, reaching roughly 220 participants by 2005\. In contrast, rugby fell sharply from around 200 in 1995 to just 50 in 2005, marking the most significant change on the chart. Basketball remained fairly stable, peaking at about 90 in 1995 and 2000 before ending at around 80\. Similarly, badminton showed minor variation, finishing at approximately 50 participants.

title: Line Graph: The graph shows the value in US dollars (in millions of dollars) of investment in ...
prompt: The graph shows the value in US dollars (in millions of dollars) of investment in funds of four categories from 1988 to 2014. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Investment Funds in the US (1988–2014)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện giá trị (triệu USD) của 4 loại quỹ đầu tư tại Mỹ:

  • Property
  • Fine Art
  • Gold
  • Company shares

trong giai đoạn 1988–2014

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ multiple categories)

2\. Introduction

The line graph illustrates the value of four types of investment funds in the US, measured in millions of dollars, from 1988 to 2014\.

3\. Overview
  • Gold tăng mạnh nhất và trở thành cao nhất vào cuối kỳ
  • Company shares tăng ổn định và luôn ở mức cao
  • Fine art biến động mạnh nhất (fluctuate)
  • Property tăng chậm nhưng ổn định

→ Xu hướng chính:

  • strong growth (gold)
  • steady rise (shares, property)
  • volatility (fine art)
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia hiệu quả:

  • Body 1: Gold \+ Company shares (nhóm cao \+ tăng mạnh)
  • Body 2: Property \+ Fine art (nhóm thấp \+ biến động)
BODY 1
Gold:
  • bắt đầu \~90
  • giảm nhẹ 1992 (\~50)
  • sau đó tăng mạnh
  • đạt đỉnh \~450 (2012)
  • giảm nhẹ còn \~380 (2014)

→ dramatic upward trend

Company shares:
  • tăng từ \~30 → 150 (1994)
  • tiếp tục tăng đều
  • đạt \~250 (2014)

→ steady growth

BODY 2
Property:
  • tăng nhẹ từ \~50 → \~200 (2014)
  • không có biến động lớn

→ gradual increase

Fine art:
  • dao động mạnh
  • giảm sâu \~40 (1998)
  • tăng vọt \~170 (2004)
  • tiếp tục biến động nhưng xu hướng tăng
  • kết thúc \~330

→ high volatility

5\. Từ vựng ăn điểm
Trend:
  • rise sharply
  • increase steadily
  • fluctuate significantly
  • surge
  • dip
Structure:
  • showed a dramatic increase
  • experienced considerable fluctuations
  • followed an upward trend
  • reached a peak of

The line graph compares the value of four types of investment funds—property, fine art, gold and company shares—in the US between 1988 and 2014, measured in millions of dollars.

Overall, all four investment categories showed an upward trend over time, although gold and fine art were more volatile. Gold experienced the most dramatic growth and ended as the highest-value asset, while property increased steadily but remained the least valuable throughout the period.

In the early years, gold was already relatively high at around $90 million in 1988 and rose slightly to about $100 million in 1990 before dropping sharply to roughly $50 million in 1992\. It then recovered and fluctuated moderately until 2006, after which it surged significantly, peaking at approximately $450 million in 2012 before falling to around $380 million in 2014\.

Company shares showed a strong and consistent upward trend. Starting at about $30 million in 1988, they rose sharply to $150 million in 1994 and continued to increase steadily, reaching approximately $250 million by the end of the period.

Fine art displayed considerable fluctuations. It rose from around $65 million in 1988 to about $80 million in 1990, then dropped to roughly $40 million in 1998\. After that, it increased sharply, reaching around $175 million in 2004, before dipping again and then climbing significantly to approximately $330 million in 2014\.

Property, in contrast, followed a gradual and stable upward trend. Beginning at about $50 million in 1988, it increased steadily over time, reaching nearly $200 million by 2014, with only minor fluctuations along the way.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the percentage of Australian exports to 4 countries from 199...
prompt: The graph below shows the percentage of Australian exports to 4 countries from 1996 to 2001. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Internet Users in Japan, the US, China and India (1996–2001)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện số người dùng Internet (triệu người) ở 4 quốc gia:

  • Japan
  • US
  • China
  • India

trong giai đoạn 1996–2001

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ multiple countries)

2\. Introduction

The line graph illustrates the number of Internet users, measured in millions, in Japan, the US, China and India between 1996 and 2001\.

3\. Overview
  • China tăng mạnh nhất và trở thành cao nhất vào cuối kỳ
  • Japan giảm dần theo thời gian
  • US dao động nhưng xu hướng giảm nhẹ
  • India tăng nhưng vẫn ở mức thấp nhất

→ Xu hướng chính:

  • dramatic rise (China)
  • gradual decline (Japan)
  • fluctuation (US)
  • slight growth (India)
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia logic:

  • Body 1: China \+ India (nhóm tăng)
  • Body 2: Japan \+ US (nhóm giảm / dao động)
BODY 1

China:

  • tăng từ 2 → 28
  • đặc biệt tăng mạnh sau 1998
  • trở thành cao nhất vào 2001

→ sharp / dramatic increase

India:

  • bắt đầu rất thấp (1)
  • tăng dần lên 7 (2000)
  • giảm nhẹ còn 5 (2001)

→ gradual growth with slight fluctuation

BODY 2

Japan:

  • giảm từ 26 → 17
  • giảm mạnh giai đoạn đầu
  • sau đó ổn định

→ steady decline

US:

  • dao động: 11 → 8 → 11 → 5 → 7
  • xu hướng chung: giảm nhẹ

→ fluctuated with an overall downward trend

5\. Từ vựng ăn điểm
  • rise dramatically
  • increase sharply
  • decline steadily
  • fluctuate
  • remain stable
  • reach a peak of
  • drop to

The line graph compares the percentage of internet users in four countries—Japan, the US, China and India—between 1996 and 2001\.

Overall, China experienced a dramatic increase and became the leading country by the end of the period, whereas Japan showed a gradual decline. The US fluctuated moderately, while India rose steadily from a very low base.

In 1996, Japan had by far the highest proportion of users at 26%, followed by the US at 11%. China and India were significantly lower, at 2% and 1% respectively. Over the next two years, Japan’s figure fell steadily to 18% in 1998, while the US fluctuated, dipping to 8% in 1997 before recovering to 11% in 1998\. Meanwhile, China increased gradually to 5%, and India remained unchanged at 1%.

From 1999 onwards, China’s growth accelerated sharply, rising from 11% in 1999 to 25% in 2000 and reaching 28% in 2001, overtaking all other countries. In contrast, Japan declined slightly to 17% and then stabilised. The US dropped to 5% in 2000 before recovering modestly to 7% in the final year. India, on the other hand, climbed steadily to 7% in 2000, before falling slightly to 5% in 2001\.

title: Line Graph: The nitrogen oxide emissions produced by four vehicles (no specific time period)
prompt: The given graph shows the nitrogen oxide emissions produced by four vehicles (no specific time period). Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Nitrogen Oxide Emissions by Four Types of Vehicles at Different Speeds
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện lượng khí thải nitrogen oxide (g/km) của 4 loại phương tiện:

  • Diesel car
  • Petrol car
  • Lorries
  • Buses

theo tốc độ (10–130 kph)

→ Dạng: line graph (comparison \+ no time, but continuous variable)

2\. Introduction

The line graph compares the amount of nitrogen oxide emissions, measured in grams per kilometre, produced by four types of vehicles at different speeds.

3\. Overview
  • Diesel cars luôn thải nhiều nhất
  • Buses luôn thấp nhất
  • Diesel và petrol giảm đến khoảng 60 kph rồi tăng lại
  • Lorries và buses biến động nhẹ, khá ổn định

→ Key trends:

  • U-shaped trend (diesel & petrol)
  • slight fluctuation (lorries & buses)
  • clear ranking maintained
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo mức độ và xu hướng:

  • Body 1: Diesel \+ Petrol (biến động mạnh, cùng pattern)
  • Body 2: Lorries \+ Buses (ít biến động)
BODY 1

Diesel cars:

  • bắt đầu cao (\~38 g/km)
  • giảm xuống đáy khoảng 25 (60 kph)
  • sau đó tăng mạnh lên \~40+

→ decrease → increase (clear U-shape)

Petrol cars:

  • giảm đều từ \~32 xuống \~20
  • chạm đáy khoảng 90 kph (\~17)
  • sau đó tăng nhẹ

→ overall decline then slight recovery

BODY 2

Lorries:

  • giảm nhẹ từ \~12 xuống \~10
  • sau đó tăng lại đến \~13

→ minor fluctuation

Buses:

  • giảm từ \~8 xuống \~5
  • sau đó gần như ổn định

→ slight decline then stable

5\. Từ vựng ăn điểm
  • peak at
  • reach a low of
  • decline gradually
  • increase steadily
  • remain relatively stable
  • fluctuate slightly
  • follow a similar pattern

The line graph illustrates the amount of nitrogen oxide emissions produced by four types of vehicles—diesel cars, petrol cars, lorries and buses—at different speeds ranging from 10 to 130 kph.

Overall, diesel cars emitted the highest levels of nitrogen oxide across all speeds, while buses consistently produced the lowest. Emissions from diesel and petrol cars generally decreased as speed increased up to around 60–90 kph, before rising again. In contrast, lorries and buses showed relatively minor fluctuations throughout.

At low speeds (10 kph), diesel cars emitted approximately 38 g/km, compared to around 33 g/km for petrol cars. These figures declined steadily, reaching their lowest points at about 26 g/km (diesel) and 21 g/km (petrol) at 60 kph. After this, emissions from both vehicle types increased again, with diesel cars rising sharply to roughly 40 g/km at 130 kph, and petrol cars climbing more moderately to about 24 g/km.

Lorries started at around 12 g/km and decreased slightly to about 10 g/km at mid-range speeds, before gradually increasing again to approximately 12–13 g/km at the highest speeds. Similarly, buses emitted the least, beginning at about 8 g/km and falling to around 5 g/km at 60 kph, after which emissions remained relatively stable with only a slight upward trend towards 6 g/km by 130 kph.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the percentage of workers from five different European count...
prompt: The graph below shows the percentage of workers from five different European countries that were absent for a day or more due to illness from 1991 to 2001. Summarise the information by selecting reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Percentage of Workers with Illness Absence in Five Countries (1991–2001)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện tỷ lệ (%) người lao động nghỉ việc do ốm ở 5 quốc gia:

  • Netherlands
  • France
  • Sweden
  • UK
  • Germany

trong giai đoạn 1991–2001

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ multiple countries)

2\. Introduction

The line graph illustrates the percentage of workers taking sick leave in five countries between 1991 and 2001\.

3\. Overview
  • Netherlands luôn cao nhất trong hầu hết giai đoạn
  • Germany thấp nhất và gần như ổn định
  • France giảm rõ rệt theo thời gian
  • Sweden tăng dần sau giai đoạn đầu
  • UK dao động nhẹ, không có xu hướng rõ ràng

→ Xu hướng chính:

  • highest vs lowest clearly maintained
  • decline (France)
  • increase (Sweden)
  • fluctuation (UK, Germany relatively stable)
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo nhóm xu hướng:

  • Body 1: Netherlands \+ France (mức cao, biến động rõ)
  • Body 2: Sweden \+ UK \+ Germany (mức thấp hơn, ổn định hơn)
BODY 1

Netherlands:

  • bắt đầu khoảng 5%, giảm xuống \~4% (1996)
  • sau đó tăng lại lên hơn 5% vào 2001

→ slight decline then recovery

France:

  • bắt đầu \~5%
  • giảm liên tục xuống \~3%
  • sau đó gần như ổn định

→ steady decline then stabilization

BODY 2

Sweden:

  • dao động nhẹ đầu kỳ (\~3.1–3.3)
  • sau 1996 tăng đều lên \~4.4

→ gradual upward trend

UK:

  • dao động quanh 2.2–2.6
  • không có xu hướng rõ

→ minor fluctuation

Germany:

  • thấp nhất (\~1.4–1.7)
  • gần như ổn định toàn kỳ

→ relatively stable at a low level

5\. Từ vựng ăn điểm
  • remain the highest / lowest
  • decline steadily
  • rise gradually
  • fluctuate slightly
  • stabilize
  • recover
  • hover around

The line chart compares the proportion of workers taking sick leave in five European countries—Netherlands, France, Sweden, the UK and Germany—between 1991 and 2001\.

Overall, the Netherlands consistently recorded the highest absence rates, while Germany had the lowest throughout the period. France showed a clear downward trend, whereas Sweden generally increased over time. The UK and Germany remained relatively stable with only minor fluctuations.

In the Netherlands, the percentage started at around 5% in 1991, peaked slightly above 5% in 1992, and then declined to just under 4% in 1996\. After that, it rose steadily again, finishing at just over 5% in 2001\. France followed a contrasting pattern, beginning at 5% but falling continuously to approximately 3% by 1996, after which it remained largely unchanged.

Sweden began at just above 3% and fluctuated slightly in the early years before increasing steadily from 1996 onwards to reach around 4.4% in 2001\. Meanwhile, the UK hovered around 2.2% to 2.6% throughout the period, with only slight variations. Germany showed the lowest figures, remaining close to 1.5% to 1.7% with minimal change over the years.

title: Line Graph: The graph shows the average monthly change in the prices of three metals during 2014
prompt: The graph shows the average monthly change in the prices of three metals during 2014. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Average Monthly Change in Prices of Copper, Nickel and Zinc (2014)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện mức thay đổi giá trung bình theo tháng (%) của copper, nickel và zinc trong năm 2014, so với tháng trước đó.

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ percentage change)

→ Lưu ý: có giá trị âm (giảm) và dương (tăng)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates the average monthly percentage change in the prices of copper, nickel and zinc in 2014, compared with the previous month.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Nhìn chung, nickel biến động mạnh nhất, còn copper ổn định nhất
  • Tất cả các kim loại đều giảm mạnh vào giữa năm (đặc biệt tháng 6\)
  • Giá phục hồi vào cuối năm, kết thúc ở mức dương
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo mức độ biến động (high vs stable)

BODY 1 – Nickel & Zinc (biến động mạnh)
  • Nickel:

→ bắt đầu rất cao (\~6% Jan), giảm liên tục

→ rơi mạnh xuống \-3% (Jun) – mức thấp nhất

→ sau đó phục hồi dần, kết thúc khoảng \+1% (Dec)

  • Zinc:

→ tăng từ 1% lên 3% (Feb)

→ giảm dần và xuống mức âm khoảng \-1% (Jun–Oct)

→ phục hồi mạnh cuối năm, đạt gần 2% (Dec)

→ Key idea:

  • Cả hai đều biến động lớn, đặc biệt nickel có biên độ thay đổi mạnh nhất
BODY 2 – Copper (ổn định hơn)
  • Copper:

→ dao động nhẹ quanh mức 1–2% đầu năm

→ giảm xuống khoảng \-1% (Jun)

→ sau đó tăng lại và duy trì mức \~1% đến cuối năm

→ Key idea:

  • Copper có xu hướng ổn định nhất, với biến động nhỏ hơn hai kim loại còn lại
5\. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm
Trend verbs:
  • fluctuate
  • drop sharply
  • recover
  • remain stable
Useful structures:
  • reached a peak of
  • fell to a low of
  • showed a slight fluctuation
  • recovered gradually
So sánh:
  • more volatile than
  • relatively stable compared to
  • in contrast
Ví dụ câu:
  • Nickel experienced the most dramatic fluctuation, falling sharply to a low point in June.
  • By contrast, copper remained relatively stable throughout the year.
  • All three metals saw a recovery towards the end of the year.

The line graph shows the average month-to-month percentage change in the prices of copper, nickel and zinc in 2014\.

Overall, nickel experienced the greatest volatility, with sharp rises and falls, while copper showed the most stable pattern. Zinc fluctuated moderately, with both positive and negative changes during the year.

At the start of the year, all three metals recorded positive growth. Nickel rose most significantly, peaking at around 6% in January before falling rapidly to about 1% by March. Copper increased more modestly, from approximately 2% in January to 1% in February, then declined slightly. Zinc, in contrast, rose to a peak of about 3% in February before gradually decreasing to around 1% in May.

In June, all three metals saw a downturn. Nickel dropped sharply to approximately \-3%, its lowest point of the year, while copper fell to around \-1% and zinc also reached about \-1%. Following this, copper recovered steadily, maintaining a stable increase of around 1% from July to September before easing slightly in October and rising again towards the end of the year.

Nickel remained negative from June to October, fluctuating between \-1% and \-2%, before rebounding to positive territory in November and December. Similarly, zinc stayed slightly below zero from June to October but then recovered, ending the year at around 2%, the highest among the three metals in December.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the production of three forest industry products in a Europe...
prompt: The graph below shows the production of three forest industry products in a European country, namely timber, pulp, and paper from 1980 to 1996. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make a comparison where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Forest Industry Production (1980–1996)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường cho thấy sản lượng (triệu tấn) của ba ngành: pulp, timber và paper trong giai đoạn 1980–1996.

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ production)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates the production of pulp, timber and paper in the forest industry between 1980 and 1996, measured in million tonnes.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Nhìn chung, paper và timber có xu hướng tăng, trong khi pulp dao động
  • Paper tăng mạnh nhất và kết thúc cao nhất
  • Pulp đạt đỉnh sớm rồi giảm nhẹ về cuối
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo trend: tăng đều vs dao động

BODY 1 – Paper & Timber (xu hướng tăng)
  • Paper:

→ tăng liên tục từ khoảng 4 (1980) lên 12 (1996)

→ có một số dao động nhẹ nhưng nhìn chung là tăng mạnh và ổn định

  • Timber:

→ giảm mạnh ban đầu (1980–1982)

→ sau đó tăng đều từ khoảng 3 lên gần 10 (1996)

→ Key idea:

  • Cả hai ngành đều tăng trưởng dài hạn, đặc biệt paper là nhanh nhất
BODY 2 – Pulp (dao động)
  • Pulp:

→ tăng từ \~4.5 lên gần 9.5 (1984)

→ sau đó giảm dần và dao động quanh mức 7–8

→ kết thúc khoảng 7.5 (1996)

→ Key idea:

  • Pulp có xu hướng biến động, không tăng rõ rệt như hai ngành còn lại
5\. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm
Trend verbs:
  • increase steadily
  • fluctuate
  • peak at
  • decline slightly
Useful structures:
  • showed an overall upward trend
  • reached a peak in
  • experienced fluctuations
  • ended the period at
So sánh:
  • higher than
  • in contrast
  • compared to
Ví dụ câu:
  • Paper production showed a steady increase and finished as the highest figure.
  • Timber recovered after an initial drop and rose consistently thereafter.
  • In contrast, pulp fluctuated and remained relatively stable overall.

The line graph illustrates the production of pulp, timber and paper in a forest industry between 1980 and 1996, measured in million tonnes.

Overall, paper production increased steadily and became the highest by the end of the period. Timber also showed a general upward trend despite an early decline, while pulp fluctuated and finished slightly below its mid-period peak.

In 1980, timber was the leading product at around 5.5 million tonnes, followed by pulp at approximately 4.5 million tonnes and paper at just under 4 million tonnes. However, timber output dropped sharply to about 3 million tonnes in 1982 before recovering to nearly 7 million tonnes by 1984\. After that, it rose gradually, reaching around 9.5 million tonnes in 1996\.

Pulp production increased significantly in the early years, climbing from roughly 4.5 million tonnes in 1980 to a peak of about 9.5 million tonnes in 1984\. It then declined and fluctuated between 6.5 and 8 million tonnes for the remainder of the period, ending at approximately 7.5 million tonnes.

By contrast, paper production followed a consistent upward trend throughout. It rose from about 3.7 million tonnes in 1980 to around 7.5 million tonnes in 1990, then continued to grow, overtaking both pulp and timber after 1992 and peaking at approximately 12 million tonnes in 1996\.

title: Line Graph: The chart below gives information about car ownership in the UK from 1975 to 2005
prompt: The chart below gives information about car ownership in the UK from 1975 to 2005. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Car Ownership in the UK (1975–2005)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện tỷ lệ (%) các hộ gia đình ở UK theo số lượng ô tô sở hữu (no car, 1 car, 2 cars, 3 cars) trong giai đoạn 1975–2005.

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ proportion categories)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates the percentage of households in the UK according to the number of cars owned between 1975 and 2005\.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Nhìn chung, sở hữu 1 xe luôn phổ biến nhất
  • Tỷ lệ không có xe giảm đáng kể
  • Trong khi đó, tỷ lệ sở hữu 2 và 3 xe tăng dần theo thời gian
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo giảm vs tăng

BODY 1 – No car & 1 car
  • No car:

→ giảm mạnh từ khoảng 45% (1975) xuống \~21% (2005)

→ xu hướng giảm liên tục

  • 1 car:

→ giảm từ \~46% xuống 36% (1985)

→ sau đó tăng trở lại và đạt khoảng 45% (2005)

→ Key idea:

  • Không có xe giảm đáng kể, trong khi 1 xe vẫn chiếm tỷ lệ cao nhất dù có dao động
BODY 2 – 2 cars & 3 cars
  • 2 cars:

→ tăng đều từ khoảng 5% lên gần 18%

  • 3 cars:

→ tăng chậm từ khoảng 2% lên gần 9%

→ Key idea:

  • Sở hữu nhiều xe ngày càng phổ biến, đặc biệt là 2 cars
5\. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm
Trend verbs:
  • decline significantly
  • increase steadily
  • fluctuate
  • rise gradually
Useful structures:
  • accounted for the largest proportion
  • showed a downward trend
  • rose steadily over the period
  • remained the most common category
So sánh:
  • in contrast
  • compared to
  • whereas
Ví dụ câu:
  • The proportion of households with no car declined significantly over the period.
  • Owning one car remained the most common category throughout.
  • By contrast, the figures for two and three cars increased steadily.

The line graph illustrates changes in car ownership in the UK between 1975 and 2005, measured as percentages of households across four categories.

Overall, the proportion of households without a car declined steadily, while ownership of two or more cars increased. Households with one car remained the most common category throughout the period despite some fluctuations.

In 1975, around 45% of households had no car, a figure similar to those owning one car (approximately 46%). However, the percentage with no car fell sharply to about 26% in 1985 and continued to decrease gradually to roughly 21% by 2005\. In contrast, one-car ownership dropped initially to around 36% in 1985, before rising again to approximately 45% at the end of the period.

Meanwhile, the proportion of households owning two cars increased consistently, from about 5% in 1975 to nearly 18% in 2005\. A similar upward trend was seen for three-car ownership, although at a lower level, rising from roughly 2% to around 9% over the same period.

title: Line Graph: The graph below presents the employment patterns in the USA between 1930 and 2010
prompt: The graph below presents the employment patterns in the USA between 1930 and 2010. Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

USA Labour Force Employment (1930–2010)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện tỷ lệ (%) lực lượng lao động Mỹ làm việc trong 5 lĩnh vực (industrial, technical, sales & office, other services, farming/fishing/forestry) từ 1930 đến 2010.

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ multiple categories)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates the percentage of the US labour force employed in five different sectors between 1930 and 2010\.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Nhìn chung, farming giảm mạnh, trong khi industrial và technical tăng đáng kể
  • Industrial trở thành ngành lớn nhất vào cuối kỳ
  • Các ngành còn lại tăng nhẹ hoặc tương đối ổn định
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo giảm mạnh vs tăng

BODY 1 – Farming (giảm mạnh)
  • Farming, fishing and forestry:

→ chiếm khoảng 75% (1930) – cao nhất

→ giảm đều xuống 60% (1970)

→ giảm mạnh còn \~30% (1990)

→ tiếp tục giảm xuống gần 0% (2010)

→ Key idea:

  • Đây là ngành giảm mạnh nhất, từ dominant → gần như biến mất
BODY 2 – Các ngành còn lại (tăng)
  • Industrial:

→ gần như 0% (1930–1950)

→ tăng mạnh sau 1970, đạt khoảng \~38% (2010) → cao nhất

  • Technical:

→ tăng đều từ \~2% lên \~25%

  • Sales and office:

→ tăng dần từ \~10% lên \~20%

  • Other services:

→ dao động nhẹ quanh 8–10%, tương đối ổn định

→ Key idea:

  • Lao động chuyển dịch từ nông nghiệp sang công nghiệp và dịch vụ
5\. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm
Trend verbs:
  • decline dramatically
  • rise steadily
  • remain stable
  • increase sharply
Useful structures:
  • accounted for the largest proportion
  • experienced a significant decline
  • showed a steady upward trend
  • became the dominant sector
So sánh:
  • in contrast
  • whereas
  • compared to
Ví dụ câu:
  • Employment in farming declined dramatically over the period.
  • Industrial jobs rose sharply and became the dominant sector by 2010\.
  • Other services, by contrast, remained relatively stable throughout.

The line graph illustrates the proportion of the US labour force employed in five sectors between 1930 and 2010\.

Overall, employment in farming, fishing and forestry declined dramatically, while industrial and technical sectors grew substantially. Sales and office work also increased, whereas other services remained relatively stable over time.

In 1930, agriculture-related jobs dominated, accounting for roughly 75% of employment. This figure fell steadily to about 60% in 1970, then dropped sharply to 40% in 1980 and continued to decline to just around 2% by 2010\. In contrast, industrial employment rose from almost 0% in 1930 to around 10% in 1970, before increasing more rapidly to approximately 37% in 2010, becoming the largest sector.

Technical occupations followed a similar upward trend, growing from about 2% in 1930 to roughly 25% by the end of the period. Meanwhile, jobs in sales and office work increased more gradually, rising from around 10% in 1930 to nearly 20% in 2010, despite a slight fluctuation around 1960\.

By comparison, other services showed only minor variation. After peaking at about 15% in 1940, this category declined slightly and then stabilised at around 9–10% from 1980 onwards.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows average carbon dioxide (CO2) emissions per person in the Uni...
prompt: The graph below shows average carbon dioxide (CO2) emissions per person in the United Kingdom, Sweden, Italy and Portugal between 1967 and 2007. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Average carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions per person (1967–2007)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường cho thấy lượng khí CO₂ trung bình trên đầu người ở 4 quốc gia (UK, Portugal, Italy, Sweden) trong giai đoạn 1967–2007.

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ comparison)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates the average amount of carbon dioxide emissions per person in four countries between 1967 and 2007\.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • UK giảm dần nhưng vẫn cao nhất trong toàn bộ giai đoạn
  • Italy và Sweden tăng, đặc biệt Sweden tăng mạnh về cuối
  • Portugal tăng rồi giảm, xu hướng biến động
  • Khoảng cách giữa các nước thu hẹp dần theo thời gian
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo giảm vs tăng/biến động

BODY 1 – UK và Portugal
  • United Kingdom:

→ cao nhất, khoảng 11 (1967)

→ giảm đều xuống \~8.5 (2007)

  • Portugal:

→ tăng từ \~8.5 lên gần 10 (1977)

→ sau đó giảm mạnh xuống \~5.5 (2007)

→ Key idea:

  • UK giảm ổn định, Portugal tăng rồi giảm đáng kể
BODY 2 – Italy và Sweden
  • Italy:

→ tăng đều từ \~4 lên \~7.5

→ không có biến động lớn

  • Sweden:

→ thấp nhất ban đầu (\~1.5)

→ tăng liên tục lên \~5.5 (2007)

→ Key idea:

  • Cả hai nước tăng, nhưng Sweden có mức tăng rõ rệt hơn
5\. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm
Trend verbs:
  • decline steadily
  • increase gradually
  • fluctuate
  • rise significantly
Useful structures:
  • remained the highest throughout the period
  • showed a steady downward trend
  • experienced a sharp increase
  • reached a peak of
So sánh:
  • while / whereas
  • compared to
  • in contrast
Ví dụ câu:
  • The UK remained the highest emitter despite a gradual decline.
  • Italy showed a steady increase over the period.
  • In contrast, Portugal rose initially before falling significantly.

The line graph compares the average carbon dioxide (CO₂) emissions per person in the United Kingdom, Portugal, Italy and Sweden between 1967 and 2007\.

Overall, the UK consistently recorded the highest emissions, although its figures declined gradually over time. In contrast, Italy and Sweden showed upward trends, while Portugal’s emissions rose initially before falling significantly in the later years.

In 1967, the UK emitted just over 11 tonnes per person, far higher than Portugal (around 8.5 tonnes), Italy (4 tonnes) and Sweden (approximately 1.5 tonnes). Over the next four decades, UK emissions steadily decreased to about 8.5 tonnes in 2007\.

Portugal experienced a sharp increase from about 8.5 tonnes in 1967 to nearly 10 tonnes in 1977, before dropping markedly to 6 tonnes by 1997 and further declining to roughly 5.5 tonnes at the end of the period. Italy, by contrast, saw a continuous rise, with emissions climbing from 4 tonnes to approximately 7.5 tonnes in 2007\.

Sweden started with the lowest emissions but showed steady growth, rising from about 1.5 tonnes in 1967 to 5.5 tonnes in 2007, eventually matching Portugal’s level in the final year.

title: Line Graph: The graph below gives information on the numbers of participants for different act...
prompt:
The graph below gives information on the numbers of participants for different activities at one social center in Melbourne, Australia for the period 2000 to 2020.
Summarise the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Number of participants, by activity 2000–2020
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện số lượng người tham gia 5 hoạt động (film club, martial arts, amateur dramatics, table tennis, musical performances) trong giai đoạn 2000–2020.

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ multiple categories)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates the number of participants in five different activities between 2000 and 2020\.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Film club luôn cao nhất, tương đối ổn định
  • Table tennis tăng mạnh nhất, đặc biệt sau 2010
  • Amateur dramatics giảm liên tục
  • Musical performances bắt đầu từ 0 nhưng tăng đều
  • Martial arts dao động nhẹ, không có xu hướng rõ ràng
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo nhóm ổn định/tăng vs giảm/dao động

BODY 1 – Film club & Table tennis
  • Film club:

→ khoảng 63 (2000) → giảm nhẹ → tăng lại \~65 (2020)

→ luôn là cao nhất

  • Table tennis:

→ tăng từ \~18 lên \~55

→ tăng mạnh nhất, đặc biệt sau 2010

→ Key idea:

  • Film club ổn định ở mức cao, trong khi table tennis tăng vượt trội
BODY 2 – Các hoạt động còn lại
  • Amateur dramatics:

→ tăng nhẹ đến 2005 (\~28)

→ sau đó giảm mạnh xuống \~10 (2020)

  • Martial arts:

→ dao động quanh 30–38

→ không có xu hướng rõ ràng

  • Musical performances:

→ từ 0 (2000–2005)

→ tăng đều lên \~18 (2020)

→ Key idea:

  • Amateur dramatics giảm đáng kể, musical performances tăng dần từ mức rất thấp, còn martial arts biến động nhẹ
5\. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm
Trend:
  • rise sharply / increase significantly
  • decline steadily
  • fluctuate slightly
  • remain stable
Structure:
  • remained the most popular activity
  • experienced a dramatic increase
  • saw a gradual decline
  • started at zero and rose steadily
So sánh:
  • whereas / while
  • by contrast
  • compared to
Ví dụ câu:
  • Table tennis experienced a sharp rise after 2010\.
  • Amateur dramatics declined steadily over the period.
  • Film club remained the most popular activity throughout.

Overall, the film club consistently attracted the largest number of participants throughout the period, while table tennis experienced the most significant growth. In contrast, amateur dramatics declined steadily, becoming the least popular activity by 2020\.

In 2000, around 63 people attended the film club, compared to approximately 37 for martial arts and 26 for amateur dramatics. Table tennis had a lower figure of about 18 participants, while musical performances had virtually none. Over the next decade, film club participation dipped slightly to 60 in 2010 before recovering to around 65 by 2020\.

Table tennis showed a marked upward trend, rising from 18 in 2000 to 20 in 2010, then surging to 35 in 2015 and reaching approximately 55 participants in 2020\. Martial arts fluctuated modestly, decreasing from 37 to 31 in 2005, then increasing to 38 in 2010, and ending at about 38 again in 2020\.

By contrast, amateur dramatics fell continuously from 26 in 2000 to just 10 participants by 2020\. Musical performances, which had no participants initially, saw gradual growth, increasing to around 12 in 2010 and reaching approximately 18 by the end of the period.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the quantities of goods transported in the UK between 1974 a...
prompt:
The graph below shows the quantities of goods transported in the UK between 1974 and 2002 by four different modes of transport. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.
The line graph illustrates the number of participants in five different activities—film club, martial arts, amateur dramatics, table tennis, and musical performances—between 2000 and 2020.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Goods transported in the UK by four modes (1974–2002)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường cho thấy lượng hàng hóa (triệu tấn) được vận chuyển tại UK bằng 4 phương thức: road, water, rail, pipeline trong giai đoạn 1974–2002.

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ comparison)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates the amount of goods transported in the UK by four different modes between 1974 and 2002\.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Road luôn cao nhất và tăng đáng kể
  • Water tăng ổn định
  • Rail dao động, không có xu hướng rõ ràng
  • Pipeline thấp nhất nhưng tăng nhanh giai đoạn đầu rồi ổn định
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo tăng mạnh vs dao động/thấp

BODY 1 – Road & Water
  • Road:

→ từ \~70 lên gần 100

→ có giảm nhẹ giai đoạn đầu nhưng nhìn chung tăng mạnh

→ luôn là phương thức chính

  • Water:

→ tăng từ \~40 lên \~63

→ tăng khá đều, chỉ có giai đoạn chững nhẹ

→ Key idea:

  • Cả hai đều tăng, nhưng road vượt trội hơn rõ rệt
BODY 2 – Rail & Pipeline
  • Rail:

→ dao động quanh 30–40

→ giảm (1986), tăng lại (1990), rồi lại giảm nhẹ

→ không có xu hướng rõ ràng

  • Pipeline:

→ tăng nhanh từ \~5 lên \~23 (1982)

→ sau đó gần như ổn định quanh 20–23

→ Key idea:

  • Rail biến động, pipeline tăng sớm rồi ổn định
5\. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm
Trend:
  • increase significantly
  • rise steadily
  • fluctuate
  • level off
Structure:
  • remained the dominant mode
  • showed a steady upward trend
  • fluctuated over the period
  • rose sharply before stabilizing
So sánh:
  • by contrast
  • while / whereas
  • compared with
Ví dụ câu:
  • Road transport remained the dominant mode throughout the period.
  • Pipeline rose sharply in the early years before leveling off.
  • Rail fluctuated without a clear overall trend.

The line graph compares the amount of goods transported in the UK by four different modes—road, water, rail and pipeline—between 1974 and 2002, measured in million tonnes.

Overall, road transport was consistently the dominant mode and showed a clear upward trend over the period. Water transport also increased overall, while rail fluctuated without a clear long-term rise. Pipeline transport grew rapidly at first and then stabilised.

In 1974, around 70 million tonnes of goods were moved by road, compared to approximately 40 million tonnes by both water and rail. Pipeline accounted for a much smaller figure, at about 5 million tonnes. Road transport dipped slightly in the early 1980s but then rose steadily, reaching nearly 100 million tonnes by 2002\.

Water transport experienced moderate growth, increasing from about 38 million tonnes in 1974 to just over 60 million tonnes at the end of the period, despite a slight decline in the mid-1990s. Rail transport, by contrast, showed fluctuations: it fell from around 40 million tonnes to just above 30 million tonnes in the mid-1980s before recovering to approximately 40 million tonnes by 2002\.

Pipeline transport rose sharply from 5 million tonnes in 1974 to around 22–23 million tonnes by the early 1980s, after which it remained relatively stable, with a slight decline to about 20 million tonnes in the later years.

title: Line Graph: The number of people who used different communication services in the world
prompt: The line graph shows the number of people who used different communication services in the world. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make a comparison where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

Number of people using different communication services (1998–2008)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường cho thấy số người sử dụng (trên 100 dân) của 5 loại dịch vụ liên lạc:

  • landline
  • cellular phone
  • internet
  • fixed broadband
  • mobile broadband

trong giai đoạn 1998–2008.

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ multiple categories)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates the number of people per 100 inhabitants using five different communication services between 1998 and 2008\.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Cellular phone tăng mạnh nhất và trở thành phổ biến nhất
  • Internet tăng đều đáng kể
  • Landline tăng nhẹ rồi chững/lệch nhẹ cuối kỳ
  • Broadband (fixed & mobile) xuất hiện muộn nhưng tăng nhanh
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo tăng mạnh vs tăng nhẹ/late development

BODY 1 – Cellular phone, Internet, Landline
  • Cellular phone:

→ tăng mạnh từ \~4 lên \~63

→ vượt tất cả các dịch vụ khác

  • Internet:

→ tăng đều từ \~3 lên \~23

→ không có giảm

  • Landline:

→ tăng nhẹ từ \~13 lên \~19 (2006)

→ sau đó giảm nhẹ về \~18 (2008)

→ Key idea:

  • Mobile phone bùng nổ, internet tăng ổn định, landline gần như bão hòa
BODY 2 – Fixed & Mobile broadband
  • Fixed broadband:

→ bắt đầu khoảng 2002 (\~0)

→ tăng lên \~5 (2008)

  • Mobile broadband:

→ gần như 0 đến 2006

→ tăng lên \~3 (2008)

→ Key idea:

  • Cả hai xuất hiện muộn nhưng tăng nhanh ở cuối giai đoạn
5\. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm
Trend:
  • rise dramatically
  • increase steadily
  • level off
  • remain relatively stable
Structure:
  • experienced the most significant growth
  • became the most widely used service
  • showed a gradual increase
  • emerged later in the period
So sánh:
  • by contrast
  • while / whereas
  • compared to
Ví dụ câu:
  • Cellular phone service experienced the most dramatic growth.
  • Landline usage remained relatively stable before a slight decline.
  • Broadband services emerged later but increased rapidly towards the end.

The line graph illustrates the number of people per 100 inhabitants using five types of communication services—landline, cellular phone, internet, fixed broadband and mobile broadband—between 1998 and 2008\.

Overall, cellular phone usage rose dramatically and became the most widely used service by the end of the period. Internet and broadband services also showed strong growth, while landline usage remained relatively stable with a slight decline in the final years.

In 1998, landline service was the most common, at around 13 users per 100 people, followed by cellular phones at approximately 4\. Over the next decade, landline usage increased modestly to about 19 in 2006 before falling slightly to 18 in 2008\. In contrast, cellular phone usage surged steadily, reaching around 17 in 2002, then climbing sharply to over 60 by 2008\.

Internet usage also rose consistently, from roughly 3 users in 1998 to about 23 in 2008\. Fixed broadband appeared later, starting at virtually zero in 2002 and increasing gradually to around 5 users by the end of the period. Mobile broadband emerged even later, remaining negligible until 2006 before rising slightly to approximately 3 users in 2008\.

title: Line Graph: The graph below shows the production levels of the main kinds of fuel in the UK be...
prompt: The graph below shows the production levels of the main kinds of fuel in the UK between 1981 and 2000. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

UK Fuel Production Levels (1981–2000)
1\. Giải thích đề

Biểu đồ đường thể hiện mức sản xuất năng lượng tại UK từ 3 nguồn: coal, natural gas, petroleum trong giai đoạn 1981–2000 (đơn vị: energy units).

→ Dạng: line graph (time \+ comparison)

2\. Introduction (paraphrase)

The line graph illustrates the levels of fuel production in the UK from coal, natural gas and petroleum between 1981 and 2000\.

3\. Overview (ý chính)
  • Petroleum luôn cao nhất, dù có biến động
  • Natural gas tăng mạnh và vượt coal vào cuối kỳ
  • Coal giảm dần đáng kể
  • Xu hướng chung: chuyển dịch từ coal sang gas
4\. Cách chia BODY

→ Chia theo tăng vs giảm \+ dominant source

BODY 1 – Petroleum
  • bắt đầu khoảng \~90 (1981)
  • tăng mạnh lên \~140 (1986)
  • giảm xuống \~90 (1991)
  • sau đó tăng lại và ổn định ở \~140 (1996–2000)

→ Key idea:

  • luôn cao nhất, nhưng có biến động rõ
BODY 2 – Natural gas & Coal
  • Natural gas:

→ tăng đều từ \~38 lên \~100

→ tăng mạnh nhất giai đoạn sau 1991

  • Coal:

→ giảm từ \~80 xuống \~35

→ giảm liên tục, chỉ tăng nhẹ giai đoạn giữa

→ Key idea:

  • gas tăng mạnh và vượt coal, trong khi coal suy giảm rõ rệt
5\. Từ vựng & cấu trúc ăn điểm
Trend:
  • increase steadily
  • rise sharply
  • decline significantly
  • fluctuate
Structure:
  • remained the dominant source
  • showed a downward trend
  • experienced a sharp increase
  • overtook
So sánh:
  • while / whereas
  • in contrast
  • compared to
Ví dụ câu:
  • Petroleum remained the dominant fuel despite fluctuations.
  • Natural gas rose steadily and eventually overtook coal.
  • Coal production declined significantly over the period.

The line graph shows changes in UK fuel production levels from 1981 to 2000, measured in energy units, for coal, natural gas and petroleum.

Overall, petroleum remained the dominant source throughout the period despite some fluctuations. Natural gas experienced a steady and then rapid increase, while coal production declined consistently over time.

In 1981, coal and petroleum were the main fuels, at about 80 and 85 energy units respectively, whereas natural gas was much lower at around 37 units. Petroleum production rose sharply to approximately 140 units in 1986 before falling to about 90 in 1991\. It then recovered, reaching around 140 units again in 1996 and remaining stable at this level in 2000\.

Coal production followed the opposite trend. After starting at roughly 80 units in 1981, it dropped significantly to just under 50 in 1983, recovered slightly to around 60 in 1986, and then declined steadily to about 35 units by 2000\.

Natural gas showed continuous growth. It increased gradually from about 37 units in 1981 to 42 in 1991, before rising more sharply to nearly 80 units in 1996 and finishing at approximately 100 units in 2000\.

title: Bar Chart: The graph below shows the percentage of self-employed workers of the total workfor...
prompt: The graph below shows the percentage of self-employed workers of the total workforce in five countries in 1998 and 2008. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

IELTS Writing Task 1 – Percentage by country (1998 vs 2008)

1. Hiểu đề bài

Biểu đồ so sánh tỷ lệ (percentage) của 5 quốc gia: Russian republic; Slovakia; Czech republic; Greece; Turkey, trong 2 năm: 1998 và 2008

Dạng này: so sánh giữa quốc gia \+ thay đổi theo thời gian nha

2. Cách viết Introduction

Paraphrase đề, giữ:

  • percentage
  • five countries
  • 2 năm (1998 & 2008)

3. Cách viết Overview

  • Hầu hết các quốc gia đều tăng
  • Turkey và Greece có tỷ lệ cao nhất ở cả hai năm
  • Russian republic luôn thấp nhất

4. Cách chia Body

BODY 1 – Nhóm thấp

  • Russian republic:

5% → 7%

→ tăng nhẹ, vẫn thấp nhất

  • Slovakia:

7% → 12%

→ tăng rõ

  • Czech republic:

12% → 15%

→ tăng nhẹ

BODY 2 – Nhóm cao

  • Greece:

42% → 35%

→ giảm nhẹ

  • Turkey:

55% → 38%

→ giảm đáng kể nhưng vẫn cao nhất

5. Gợi ý paraphrase

  • the percentage of
  • increased slightly / rose steadily
  • declined moderately
  • remained the highest / lowest

Ví dụ:

Turkey recorded the highest percentage in both years despite a noticeable decline.

The bar chart compares the percentages of people living in urban areas in five countries—the Russian Republic, Slovakia, the Czech Republic, Greece and Turkey—in 1998 and 2008.

Overall, urbanisation increased in the Russian Republic, Slovakia and the Czech Republic over the period, whereas Greece and Turkey experienced declines. Turkey remained the most urbanised country in both years, while the Russian Republic had the lowest figures.

In 1998, Turkey recorded the highest proportion of urban residents at 55%, followed by Greece at 42%. Much lower figures were seen in the Czech Republic (12%), Slovakia (7%) and the Russian Republic (5%). By 2008, the Czech Republic rose to 15%, Slovakia to 12%, and the Russian Republic to 7%, indicating gradual urban growth in these countries.

In contrast, Greece saw a decrease from 42% to 35%, while Turkey experienced a more notable decline from 55% to 38%, though it still maintained the highest proportion among the five nations.

title: Bar Chart: The chart below compares the number of people per household in the UK in 1981 and ...
prompt: The chart below compares the number of people per household in the UK in 1981 and 2001. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features, and make comparisons where relevant.
guideHtml:
HƯỚNG DẪN VIẾT BÀI

IELTS Writing Task 1 – Household size (1981 vs 2001)

1. Hiểu đề bài

Biểu đồ cho thấy tỷ lệ hộ gia đình theo số người: 1-person; 2-person; 3-person; 4-person; 5-person; 6-person, ở hai năm 1981 và 2001

👉 Dạng này: so sánh giữa hai năm \+ phân bố (distribution) nha

2. Cách viết Introduction

Paraphrase với:

  • the proportion of households
  • by household size
  • in two different years

3. Cách viết Overview

  • Hộ ít người (1–2 người) tăng
  • Hộ đông người (4–6 người) giảm
  • Hộ 2 người luôn chiếm tỷ lệ cao nhất
  • Hộ 6 người thấp nhất và giảm mạnh

4. Cách chia Body

BODY 1 – Nhóm hộ nhỏ (1–3 người)

  • 1-person: 17% → 26% (tăng mạnh)
  • 2-person: 31% → 34% (cao nhất, tăng nhẹ)
  • 3-person: 20% → 17% (giảm nhẹ)

→ xu hướng chung: hộ nhỏ tăng, đặc biệt 1-person

BODY 2 – Nhóm hộ lớn (4–6 người)

  • 4-person: 18% → 15% (giảm)
  • 5-person: 8% → 6% (giảm)
  • 6-person: 6% → 2% (giảm mạnh nhất)

→ tất cả đều giảm, đặc biệt hộ rất đông

5. Gợi ý paraphrase

  • household size distribution
  • accounted for the largest proportion
  • increased significantly / declined steadily
  • made up a smaller share

Ví dụ:

One-person households increased significantly from 17% to 26%.

he bar chart compares the distribution of households by size in 1981 and 2001.

Overall, smaller households became more common over time, while larger households declined. In particular, one- and two-person households increased, whereas households with five or six members decreased noticeably.

In 1981, two-person households accounted for the largest share at 31%, followed by three-person households at 20%. One-person households made up 17%, while four-, five-, and six-person households represented 18%, 8%, and 6%, respectively.

By 2001, the proportion of one-person households had risen significantly to 26%, and two-person households also increased slightly to 34%, remaining the most common type. In contrast, three-person households fell to 17%, and four-person households declined to 15%.

The most notable decreases were seen in larger households. Five-person households dropped from 8% to 6%, while six-person households fell sharply from 6% to just 2%.

The bar chart compares the proportions of Chinese and Indian populations across various provinces and territories in Canada.
